✓ TOOL RESULT
SUCCESS 
     1→// Global state
     2→let ws, audioContext, processor, source, stream;
     3→let isRecording = false;
     4→let isReplaying = false;
     5→let isStopping = false; // Flag to allow final audio processing during stop
     6→let timerInterval;
     7→let startTime;
     8→let audioBuffer = new Int16Array(0);
     9→let wsConnected = false;
    10→let streamInitialized = false;
    11→let isAutoStarted = false;
    12→
    13→// IndexedDB state
    14→let db = null;
    15→let currentSessionId = null;
    16→let sessionStartTime = null;
    17→let chunkSeq = 0;
    18→let storageAvailable = false;
    19→
    20→// DOM elements
    21→const recordButton = document.getElementById('recordButton');
    22→const replayButton = document.getElementById('replayButton');
    23→const storageStatus = document.getElementById('storageStatus');
    24→const transcript = document.getElementById('transcript');
    25→const enhancedTranscript = document.getElementById('enhancedTranscript');
    26→const copyButton = document.getElementById('copyButton');
    27→const copyEnhancedButton = document.getElementById('copyEnhancedButton');
    28→const readabilityButton = document.getElementById('readabilityButton');
    29→const askAIButton = document.getElementById('askAIButton');
    30→const correctnessButton = document.getElementById('correctnessButton');
    31→
    32→// Configuration
    33→const targetSeconds = 5;
    34→const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    35→const autoStart = urlParams.get('start') === '1';
    36→
    37→// Utility functions
    38→const isMobileDevice = () => /Android|webOS|iPhone|iPad|iPod|BlackBerry|IEMobile|Opera Mini/i.test(navigator.userAgent);
    39→
    40→async function copyToClipboard(text, button) {
    41→    if (!text) return;
    42→    try {
    43→        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
    44→        showCopiedFeedback(button, 'Copied!');
    45→    } catch (err) {
    46→        console.error('Clipboard copy failed:', err);
    47→        // alert('Clipboard copy failed: ' + err.message);
    48→        // We don't show this message because it's not accurate. We could still write to the clipboard in this case.
    49→    }
    50→}
    51→
    52→function showCopiedFeedback(button, message) {
    53→    if (!button) return;
    54→    const originalText = button.textContent;
    55→    button.textContent = message;
    56→    setTimeout(() => {
    57→        button.textContent = originalText;
    58→    }, 2000);
    59→}
    60→
    61→// Timer functions
    62→function startTimer() {
    63→    clearInterval(timerInterval);
    64→    document.getElementById('timer').textContent = '00:00';
    65→    startTime = Date.now();
    66→    timerInterval = setInterval(() => {
    67→        const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
    68→        const minutes = Math.floor(elapsed / 60000);
    69→        const seconds = Math.floor((elapsed % 60000) / 1000);
    70→        document.getElementById('timer').textContent = 
    71→            `${minutes.toString().padStart(2, '0')}:${seconds.toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;
    72→    }, 1000);
    73→}
    74→
    75→function stopTimer() {
    76→    clearInterval(timerInterval);
    77→}
    78→
    79→// IndexedDB initialization
    80→async function initIndexedDB() {
    81→    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    82→        const request = indexedDB.open('brainwave-replay', 1);
    83→        
    84→        request.onerror = () => {
    85→            console.warn('IndexedDB not available, replay disabled');
    86→            storageAvailable = false;
    87→            if (replayButton) {
    88→                replayButton.disabled = true;
    89→                replayButton.title = 'Local storage not available';
    90→            }
    91→            resolve(false);
    92→        };
    93→        
    94→        request.onsuccess = () => {
    95→            db = request.result;
    96→            
    97→            // Check if required object stores exist
    98→            if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains('sessions') || !db.objectStoreNames.contains('chunks')) {
    99→                // Close and delete the database, then reopen to trigger onupgradeneeded
   100→                db.close();
   101→                const deleteRequest = indexedDB.deleteDatabase('brainwave-replay');
   102→                deleteRequest.onsuccess = () => {
   103→                    // Reopen database - this will trigger onupgradeneeded
   104→                    const reopenRequest = indexedDB.open('brainwave-replay', 1);
   105→                    reopenRequest.onsuccess = () => {
   106→                        db = reopenRequest.result;
   107→                        storageAvailable = true;
   108→                        if (replayButton) {
   109→                            replayButton.disabled = false;
   110→                        }
   111→                        updateReplayButtonState();
   112→                        resolve(true);
   113→                    };
   114→                    reopenRequest.onerror = () => {
   115→                        console.warn('Failed to reopen IndexedDB after cleanup');
   116→                        storageAvailable = false;
   117→                        if (replayButton) {
   118→                            replayButton.disabled = true;
   119→                            replayButton.title = 'Local storage not available';
   120→                        }
   121→                        resolve(false);
   122→                    };
   123→                    reopenRequest.onupgradeneeded = (event) => {
   124→                        const db = event.target.result;
   125→                        // Create sessions store
   126→                        if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains('sessions')) {
   127→                            const sessionsStore = db.createObjectStore('sessions', { keyPath: 'id', autoIncrement: true });
   128→                            sessionsStore.createIndex('status', 'status', { unique: false });
   129→                            sessionsStore.createIndex('createdAt', 'createdAt', { unique: false });
   130→                        }
   131→                        // Create chunks store
   132→                        if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains('chunks')) {
   133→                            const chunksStore = db.createObjectStore('chunks', { keyPath: 'id', autoIncrement: true });
   134→                            chunksStore.createIndex('sessionId', 'sessionId', { unique: false });
   135→                            chunksStore.createIndex('seq', 'seq', { unique: false });
   136→                        }
   137→                    };
   138→                };
   139→                deleteRequest.onerror = () => {
   140→                    console.warn('Failed to delete corrupted IndexedDB');
   141→                    storageAvailable = false;
   142→                    if (replayButton) {
   143→                        replayButton.disabled = true;
   144→                        replayButton.title = 'Local storage not available';
   145→                    }
   146→                    resolve(false);
   147→                };
   148→                return;
   149→            }
   150→            
   151→            storageAvailable = true;
   152→            if (replayButton) {
   153→                replayButton.disabled = false;
   154→            }
   155→            updateReplayButtonState();
   156→            resolve(true);
   157→        };
   158→        
   159→        request.onupgradeneeded = (event) => {
   160→            db = event.target.result;
   161→            
   162→            // Create sessions store
   163→            if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains('sessions')) {
   164→                const sessionsStore = db.createObjectStore('sessions', { keyPath: 'id', autoIncrement: true });
   165→                sessionsStore.createIndex('status', 'status', { unique: false });
   166→                sessionsStore.createIndex('createdAt', 'createdAt', { unique: false });
   167→            }
   168→            
   169→            // Create chunks store
   170→            if (!db.objectStoreNames.contains('chunks')) {
   171→                const chunksStore = db.createObjectStore('chunks', { keyPath: 'id', autoIncrement: true });
   172→                chunksStore.createIndex('sessionId', 'sessionId', { unique: false });
   173→                chunksStore.createIndex('seq', 'seq', { unique: false });
   174→            }
   175→        };
   176→    });
   177→}
   178→
   179→// Audio processing
   180→function createAudioProcessor() {
   181→    processor = audioContext.createScriptProcessor(4096, 1, 1);
   182→    processor.onaudioprocess = async (e) => {
   183→        // Allow processing if recording OR if stopping (to capture final audio)
   184→        if (!isRecording && !isStopping) return;
   185→        
   186→        const inputData = e.inputBuffer.getChannelData(0);
   187→        const pcmData = new Int16Array(inputData.length);
   188→        
   189→        for (let i = 0; i < inputData.length; i++) {
   190→            pcmData[i] = Math.max(-32768, Math.min(32767, Math.floor(inputData[i] * 32767)));
   191→        }
   192→        
   193→        const combinedBuffer = new Int16Array(audioBuffer.length + pcmData.length);
   194→        combinedBuffer.set(audioBuffer);
   195→        combinedBuffer.set(pcmData, audioBuffer.length);
   196→        audioBuffer = combinedBuffer;
   197→        
   198→        if (audioBuffer.length >= 24000) {
   199→            const sendBuffer = audioBuffer.slice(0, 24000);
   200→            audioBuffer = audioBuffer.slice(24000);
   201→            
   202→            if (ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
   203→                ws.send(sendBuffer.buffer);
   204→                
   205→                // Store chunk in IndexedDB
   206→                if (storageAvailable && currentSessionId && sessionStartTime) {
   207→                    const deltaMs = performance.now() - sessionStartTime;
   208→                    await appendChunk(currentSessionId, {
   209→                        seq: chunkSeq++,
   210→                        deltaMs: deltaMs,
   211→                        kind: 'audio',
   212→                        payload: sendBuffer.buffer,
   213→                        byteLength: sendBuffer.byteLength
   214→                    });
   215→                }
   216→            }
   217→        }
   218→    };
   219→    return processor;
   220→}
   221→
   222→async function initAudio(stream) {
   223→    console.log('Initializing AudioContext...');
   224→    // Clean up existing audio context if any
   225→    if (audioContext && audioContext.state !== 'closed') {
   226→        try {
   227→            await audioContext.close();
   228→        } catch (e) {
   229→            console.warn('Error closing existing audio context:', e);
   230→        }
   231→    }
   232→    
   233→    try {
   234→        audioContext = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
   235→        source = audioContext.createMediaStreamSource(stream);
   236→        processor = createAudioProcessor();
   237→        source.connect(processor);
   238→        processor.connect(audioContext.destination);
   239→        
   240→        if (audioContext.state === 'suspended') {
   241→            await audioContext.resume();
   242→        }
   243→    } catch (e) {
   244→        console.error('initAudio failed:', e);
   245→        throw e;
   246→    }
   247→}
   248→
   249→function cleanupAudioResources() {
   250→    // Stop all tracks in the stream
   251→    if (stream) {
   252→        stream.getTracks().forEach(track => {
   253→            track.stop();
   254→        });
   255→        stream = null;
   256→    }
   257→    
   258→    // Close audio context
   259→    if (audioContext && audioContext.state !== 'closed') {
   260→        audioContext.close().catch(e => {
   261→            console.warn('Error closing audio context:', e);
   262→        });
   263→        audioContext = null;
   264→    }
   265→    
   266→    source = null;
   267→    processor = null;
   268→    streamInitialized = false;
   269→}
   270→
   271→// WebSocket handling
   272→function updateConnectionStatus(status) {
   273→    const statusDot = document.getElementById('connectionStatus');
   274→    statusDot.classList.remove('connected', 'connecting', 'idle');
   275→    
   276→    switch (status) {
   277→        case 'connected':  // OpenAI is connected and ready
   278→            statusDot.classList.add('connected');
   279→            statusDot.style.backgroundColor = '#34C759';  // Green
   280→            break;
   281→        case 'connecting':  // Establishing OpenAI connection
   282→            statusDot.classList.add('connecting');
   283→            statusDot.style.backgroundColor = '#FF9500';  // Orange
   284→            break;
   285→        case 'idle':  // Client connected, OpenAI not connected
   286→            statusDot.classList.add('idle');
   287→            statusDot.style.backgroundColor = '#007AFF';  // Blue
   288→            break;
   289→        default:  // Disconnected
   290→            statusDot.style.backgroundColor = '#FF3B30';  // Red
   291→    }
   292→}
   293→
   294→function initializeWebSocket() {
   295→    const protocol = window.location.protocol === 'https:' ? 'wss' : 'ws';
   296→    ws = new WebSocket(`${protocol}://${window.location.host}/api/v1/ws`);
   297→    
   298→    ws.onopen = () => {
   299→        console.log('WebSocket connected');
   300→        wsConnected = true;
   301→        // Set initial UI state to idle (blue) when socket opens
   302→        updateConnectionStatus('idle');
   303→        if (autoStart && !isRecording && !isAutoStarted) startRecording();
   304→    };
   305→    
   306→    ws.onerror = (error) => {
   307→        console.error('WebSocket error:', error);
   308→        updateConnectionStatus(false);
   309→    };
   310→    
   311→    ws.onmessage = (event) => {
   312→        const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
   313→        switch (data.type) {
   314→            case 'status':
   315→                updateConnectionStatus(data.status);
   316→                // Stop timer when not actively recording/generating
   317→                if (data.status === 'idle' || data.status === 'generating') {
   318→                    stopTimer();
   319→                }
   320→                if (data.status === 'idle') {
   321→                    copyToClipboard(transcript.value, copyButton);
   322→                    // Update replay button state when status becomes idle
   323→                    updateReplayButtonState();
   324→                }
   325→                break;
   326→            case 'text':
   327→                if (data.isNewResponse) {
   328→                    transcript.value = data.content;
   329→                    stopTimer();
   330→                } else {
   331→                    transcript.value += data.content;
   332→                }
   333→                transcript.scrollTop = transcript.scrollHeight;
   334→                break;
   335→            case 'error':
   336→                alert(data.content);
   337→                updateConnectionStatus('idle');
   338→                updateReplayButtonState();
   339→                break;
   340→        }
   341→    };
   342→    
   343→    ws.onclose = () => {
   344→        wsConnected = false;
   345→        updateConnectionStatus(false);
   346→        // Do NOT clean up audio resources here to allow reuse of microphone
   347→        // only reset recording state
   348→        isRecording = false;
   349→        isStopping = false;
   350→        recordButton.textContent = 'Start';
   351→        recordButton.classList.remove('recording');
   352→        // Reconnect after a short delay
   353→        setTimeout(initializeWebSocket, 1000);
   354→    };
   355→}
   356→
   357→// IndexedDB helpers
   358→async function createSession() {
   359→    if (!db) return null;
   360→    
   361→    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
   362→        const transaction = db.transaction(['sessions'], 'readwrite');
   363→        const store = transaction.objectStore('sessions');
   364→        const session = {
   365→            createdAt: new Date(),
   366→            status: 'recording',
   367→            sampleRate: 24000,
   368→            channelCount: 1,
   369→            durationMs: 0
   370→        };
   371→        
   372→        const request = store.add(session);
   373→        request.onsuccess = () => {
   374→            currentSessionId = request.result;
   375→            sessionStartTime = performance.now();
   376→            chunkSeq = 0;
   377→            
   378→            // Store start event
   379→            appendChunk(currentSessionId, {
   380→                seq: 0,
   381→                deltaMs: 0,
   382→                kind: 'start',
   383→                payload: null,
   384→                byteLength: 0
   385→            });
   386→            
   387→            resolve(currentSessionId);
   388→        };
   389→        request.onerror = () => reject(request.error);
   390→    });
   391→}
   392→
   393→async function appendChunk(sessionId, chunk) {
   394→    if (!db || !sessionId) return;
   395→    
   396→    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
   397→        const transaction = db.transaction(['chunks'], 'readwrite');
   398→        const store = transaction.objectStore('chunks');
   399→        const chunkData = {
   400→            sessionId: sessionId,
   401→            seq: chunk.seq,
   402→            deltaMs: chunk.deltaMs,
   403→            kind: chunk.kind,
   404→            payload: chunk.payload,
   405→            byteLength: chunk.byteLength
   406→        };
   407→        
   408→        const request = store.add(chunkData);
   409→        request.onsuccess = () => resolve();
   410→        request.onerror = () => {
   411→            console.warn('Failed to store chunk:', request.error);
   412→            resolve(); // Don't fail recording if storage fails
   413→        };
   414→    });
   415→}
   416→
   417→async function completeSession(sessionId, durationMs) {
   418→    if (!db || !sessionId) return;
   419→    
   420→    return new Promise((resolve) => {
   421→        const transaction = db.transaction(['sessions', 'chunks'], 'readwrite');
   422→        const sessionsStore = transaction.objectStore('sessions');
   423→        const chunksStore = transaction.objectStore('chunks');
   424→        
   425→        // Update session status
   426→        const getRequest = sessionsStore.get(sessionId);
   427→        getRequest.onsuccess = () => {
   428→            const session = getRequest.result;
   429→            session.status = 'completed';
   430→            session.durationMs = durationMs;
   431→            sessionsStore.put(session);
   432→            
   433→            // Store stop event
   434→            chunksStore.add({
   435→                sessionId: sessionId,
   436→                seq: chunkSeq++,
   437→                deltaMs: durationMs,
   438→                kind: 'stop',
   439→                payload: null,
   440→                byteLength: 0
   441→            });
   442→            
   443→            // Enforce quota
   444→            enforceQuota({ maxSessions: 5, maxBytes: 100 * 1024 * 1024 });
   445→            
   446→            resolve();
   447→        };
   448→        getRequest.onerror = () => resolve();
   449→    });
   450→}
   451→
   452→async function enforceQuota({ maxSessions, maxBytes }) {
   453→    if (!db) return;
   454→    
   455→    const transaction = db.transaction(['sessions', 'chunks'], 'readwrite');
   456→    const sessionsStore = transaction.objectStore('sessions');
   457→    const chunksStore = transaction.objectStore('chunks');
   458→    const index = sessionsStore.index('createdAt');
   459→    
   460→    const sessions = [];
   461→    index.openCursor().onsuccess = (event) => {
   462→        const cursor = event.target.result;
   463→        if (cursor) {
   464→            sessions.push(cursor.value);
   465→            cursor.continue();
   466→        } else {
   467→            // Sort by creation time (oldest first)
   468→            sessions.sort((a, b) => a.createdAt - b.createdAt);
   469→            
   470→            // Delete oldest sessions if over limit
   471→            while (sessions.length > maxSessions) {
   472→                const session = sessions.shift();
   473→                deleteSession(session.id);
   474→            }
   475→        }
   476→    };
   477→}
   478→
   479→async function deleteSession(sessionId) {
   480→    if (!db) return;
   481→    
   482→    const transaction = db.transaction(['sessions', 'chunks'], 'readwrite');
   483→    const sessionsStore = transaction.objectStore('sessions');
   484→    const chunksStore = transaction.objectStore('chunks');
   485→    const index = chunksStore.index('sessionId');
   486→    
   487→    // Delete all chunks for this session
   488→    index.openKeyCursor(IDBKeyRange.only(sessionId)).onsuccess = (event) => {
   489→        const cursor = event.target.result;
   490→        if (cursor) {
   491→            chunksStore.delete(cursor.primaryKey);
   492→            cursor.continue();
   493→        }
   494→    };
   495→    
   496→    // Delete session
   497→    sessionsStore.delete(sessionId);
   498→}
   499→
   500→async function getLatestCompletedSession() {
   501→    if (!db) return null;
   502→    
   503→    return new Promise((resolve) => {
   504→        const transaction = db.transaction(['sessions'], 'readonly');
   505→        const store = transaction.objectStore('sessions');
   506→        const index = store.index('status');
   507→        const request = index.getAll('completed');
   508→        
   509→        request.onsuccess = () => {
   510→            const sessions = request.result;
   511→            if (sessions.length === 0) {
   512→                resolve(null);
   513→                return;
   514→            }
   515→            
   516→            // Sort by creation time (newest first)
   517→            sessions.sort((a, b) => b.createdAt - a.createdAt);
   518→            resolve(sessions[0]);
   519→        };
   520→        request.onerror = () => resolve(null);
   521→    });
   522→}
   523→
   524→async function getSessionChunks(sessionId) {
   525→    if (!db || !sessionId) return [];
   526→    
   527→    return new Promise((resolve) => {
   528→        const transaction = db.transaction(['chunks'], 'readonly');
   529→        const store = transaction.objectStore('chunks');
   530→        const index = store.index('sessionId');
   531→        const request = index.getAll(sessionId);
   532→        
   533→        request.onsuccess = () => {
   534→            const chunks = request.result;
   535→            chunks.sort((a, b) => a.seq - b.seq);
   536→            resolve(chunks);
   537→        };
   538→        request.onerror = () => resolve([]);
   539→    });
   540→}
   541→
   542→// Recording control
   543→async function startRecording() {
   544→    if (isRecording || isReplaying) return;
   545→    
   546→    // Check WebSocket connection
   547→    if (!ws || ws.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN) {
   548→        alert('WebSocket is not connected. Please wait a moment or refresh the page.');
   549→        return;
   550→    }
   551→    
   552→    try {
   553→        transcript.value = '';
   554→        enhancedTranscript.value = '';
   555→
   556→        // Check if stream is still valid, reinitialize ONLY if needed
   557→        let streamActive = false;
   558→        try {
   559→            streamActive = streamInitialized && stream && stream.active && 
   560→                          stream.getTracks().length > 0 && 
   561→                          stream.getTracks().every(track => track.readyState === 'live');
   562→        } catch (e) {
   563→            console.warn('Error checking stream status:', e);
   564→            streamActive = false;
   565→        }
   566→        
   567→        if (!streamActive) {
   568→            console.log('Reinitializing microphone stream...');
   569→            cleanupAudioResources();
   570→            
   571→            try {
   572→                stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ 
   573→                    audio: {
   574→                        channelCount: 1,
   575→                        echoCancellation: true,
   576→                        noiseSuppression: true,
   577→                        autoGainControl: true
   578→                    } 
   579→                });
   580→                streamInitialized = true;
   581→            } catch (err) {
   582→                console.error('getUserMedia error:', err);
   583→                throw new Error('Could not access microphone. Please check permissions.');
   584→            }
   585→        }
   586→
   587→        if (!stream) throw new Error('Failed to initialize audio stream');
   588→        
   589→        // Ensure AudioContext is active
   590→        if (!audioContext || audioContext.state === 'closed') {
   591→            await initAudio(stream);
   592→        } else if (audioContext.state === 'suspended') {
   593→            await audioContext.resume();
   594→        }
   595→
   596→        isRecording = true;
   597→        const modelSelect = document.getElementById('modelSelect');
   598→        const selectedModel = modelSelect ? modelSelect.value : 'gpt-realtime-mini-2025-12-15';
   599→        
   600→        // Create session in IndexedDB
   601→        if (storageAvailable) {
   602→            await createSession();
   603→        }
   604→        
   605→        const startMessage = { 
   606→            type: 'start_recording', 
   607→            model: selectedModel
   608→        };
   609→        console.log('Sending start_recording:', startMessage);
   610→        await ws.send(JSON.stringify(startMessage));
   611→        
   612→        startTimer();
   613→        recordButton.textContent = 'Stop';
   614→        recordButton.classList.add('recording');
   615→        if (replayButton) replayButton.disabled = true;
   616→        
   617→    } catch (error) {
   618→        console.error('Error starting recording:', error);
   619→        alert('Error accessing microphone: ' + error.message);
   620→    }
   621→}
   622→
   623→async function stopRecording() {
   624→    if (!isRecording) return;
   625→    
   626→    // Set stopping flag first to allow final audio processing
   627→    isStopping = true;
   628→    isRecording = false;
   629→    const durationMs = performance.now() - sessionStartTime;
   630→    
   631→    // Stop local timer immediately on stop
   632→    stopTimer();
   633→    
   634→    // Wait a bit to allow any in-flight onaudioprocess callbacks to complete
   635→    // This ensures we capture the last bit of audio data
   636→    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 100));
   637→    
   638→    // Send any remaining audio buffer
   639→    if (audioBuffer.length > 0 && ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
   640→        const sendBuffer = audioBuffer.slice();
   641→        ws.send(sendBuffer.buffer);
   642→        
   643→        // Store final chunk
   644→        if (storageAvailable && currentSessionId && sessionStartTime) {
   645→            const deltaMs = performance.now() - sessionStartTime;
   646→            await appendChunk(currentSessionId, {
   647→                seq: chunkSeq++,
   648→                deltaMs: deltaMs,
   649→                kind: 'audio',
   650→                payload: sendBuffer.buffer,
   651→                byteLength: sendBuffer.byteLength
   652→            });
   653→        }
   654→        
   655→        audioBuffer = new Int16Array(0);
   656→    }
   657→    
   658→    // Clear stopping flag
   659→    isStopping = false;
   660→    
   661→    // Wait a bit more to ensure all audio is sent before stopping
   662→    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500));
   663→    await ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'stop_recording' }));
   664→    
   665→    // Complete session in IndexedDB
   666→    if (storageAvailable && currentSessionId) {
   667→        await completeSession(currentSessionId, durationMs);
   668→        currentSessionId = null;
   669→        sessionStartTime = null;
   670→        chunkSeq = 0;
   671→    }
   672→    
   673→    recordButton.textContent = 'Start';
   674→    recordButton.classList.remove('recording');
   675→    updateReplayButtonState();
   676→}
   677→
   678→// Replay functionality
   679→async function replayLastRecording() {
   680→    if (isRecording || isReplaying || !storageAvailable) return;
   681→    
   682→    const session = await getLatestCompletedSession();
   683→    if (!session) {
   684→        alert('No completed recording found to replay.');
   685→        return;
   686→    }
   687→    
   688→    if (isRecording) {
   689→        alert('Please stop recording before replaying.');
   690→        return;
   691→    }
   692→    
   693→    isReplaying = true;
   694→    recordButton.disabled = true;
   695→    if (replayButton) {
   696→        replayButton.disabled = true;
   697→        replayButton.title = 'Replaying...';
   698→        replayButton.style.animation = 'spin 1s linear infinite';
   699→    }
   700→    
   701→    try {
   702→        // Get chunks for this session
   703→        const chunks = await getSessionChunks(session.id);
   704→        if (chunks.length === 0) {
   705→            throw new Error('No chunks found for session');
   706→        }
   707→        
   708→        // Clear transcript
   709→        transcript.value = '';
   710→        enhancedTranscript.value = '';
   711→        
   712→        // Ensure WebSocket is connected
   713→        if (!wsConnected || ws.readyState !== WebSocket.OPEN) {
   714→            await new Promise((resolve) => {
   715→                const checkConnection = setInterval(() => {
   716→                    if (wsConnected && ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
   717→                        clearInterval(checkConnection);
   718→                        resolve();
   719→                    }
   720→                }, 100);
   721→            });
   722→        }
   723→        
   724→        // Send start_recording message
   725→        const modelSelect = document.getElementById('modelSelect');
   726→        const selectedModel = modelSelect ? modelSelect.value : 'gpt-realtime-mini-2025-12-15';
   727→        
   728→        const startMessage = { 
   729→            type: 'start_recording', 
   730→            model: selectedModel
   731→        };
   732→        console.log('Sending start_recording:', startMessage);
   733→        await ws.send(JSON.stringify(startMessage));
   734→        
   735→        // Wait a bit for backend to initialize
   736→        await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 200));
   737→        
   738→        // Replay audio chunks - send as fast as possible
   739→        const audioChunks = chunks.filter(c => c.kind === 'audio' && c.payload);
   740→        
   741→        // Send all audio chunks immediately
   742→        for (const chunk of audioChunks) {
   743→            if (ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
   744→                ws.send(chunk.payload);
   745→            } else {
   746→                throw new Error('WebSocket closed during replay');
   747→            }
   748→        }
   749→        
   750→        // Send stop_recording after all audio chunks
   751→        await ws.send(JSON.stringify({ type: 'stop_recording' }));
   752→        
   753→    } catch (error) {
   754→        console.error('Error replaying recording:', error);
   755→        alert('Error replaying recording: ' + error.message);
   756→    } finally {
   757→        isReplaying = false;
   758→        recordButton.disabled = false;
   759→        updateReplayButtonState();
   760→    }
   761→}
   762→
   763→function updateReplayButtonState() {
   764→    if (!replayButton) return;
   765→    
   766→    if (!storageAvailable) {
   767→        replayButton.disabled = true;
   768→        replayButton.title = 'Local storage not available';
   769→        return;
   770→    }
   771→    
   772→    if (isRecording || isReplaying) {
   773→        replayButton.disabled = true;
   774→        if (isReplaying) {
   775→            replayButton.title = 'Replaying...';
   776→            replayButton.style.animation = 'spin 1s linear infinite';
   777→        } else {
   778→            replayButton.title = 'Recording in progress';
   779→            replayButton.style.animation = '';
   780→        }
   781→        return;
   782→    }
   783→    
   784→    // Check if there's a completed session
   785→    getLatestCompletedSession().then(session => {
   786→        if (session) {
   787→            replayButton.disabled = false;
   788→            replayButton.title = 'Replay last recording';
   789→            replayButton.style.animation = '';
   790→        } else {
   791→            replayButton.disabled = true;
   792→            replayButton.title = 'No recording to replay';
   793→            replayButton.style.animation = '';
   794→        }
   795→    });
   796→}
   797→
   798→// Event listeners
   799→recordButton.onclick = () => isRecording ? stopRecording() : startRecording();
   800→if (replayButton) replayButton.onclick = replayLastRecording;
   801→copyButton.onclick = () => copyToClipboard(transcript.value, copyButton);
   802→copyEnhancedButton.onclick = () => copyToClipboard(enhancedTranscript.value, copyEnhancedButton);
   803→
   804→// Handle spacebar toggle
   805→document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
   806→    if (event.code === 'Space') {
   807→        const activeElement = document.activeElement;
   808→        if (!activeElement.tagName.match(/INPUT|TEXTAREA/) && !activeElement.isContentEditable) {
   809→            event.preventDefault();
   810→            recordButton.click();
   811→        }
   812→    }
   813→});
   814→
   815→// Initialize on page load
   816→document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', async () => {
   817→    await initIndexedDB();
   818→    initializeWebSocket();
   819→    initializeTheme();
   820→});
   821→// Readability and AI handlers
   822→if (readabilityButton) readabilityButton.onclick = async () => {
   823→    startTimer();
   824→    const inputText = transcript.value.trim();
   825→    if (!inputText) {
   826→        alert('Please enter text to enhance readability.');
   827→        stopTimer();
   828→        return;
   829→    }
   830→
   831→    try {
   832→        const response = await fetch('/api/v1/readability', {
   833→            method: 'POST',
   834→            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   835→            body: JSON.stringify({ text: inputText })
   836→        });
   837→
   838→        if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Readability enhancement failed');
   839→
   840→        const reader = response.body.getReader();
   841→        const decoder = new TextDecoder();
   842→        let fullText = '';
   843→
   844→        while (true) {
   845→            const { done, value } = await reader.read();
   846→            if (done) break;
   847→            fullText += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
   848→            enhancedTranscript.value = fullText;
   849→            enhancedTranscript.scrollTop = enhancedTranscript.scrollHeight;
   850→        }
   851→
   852→        if (!isMobileDevice()) copyToClipboard(fullText, copyEnhancedButton);
   853→        stopTimer();
   854→
   855→    } catch (error) {
   856→        console.error('Error:', error);
   857→        alert('Error enhancing readability');
   858→        stopTimer();
   859→    }
   860→};
   861→
   862→if (askAIButton) askAIButton.onclick = async () => {
   863→    startTimer();
   864→    const inputText = transcript.value.trim();
   865→    if (!inputText) {
   866→        alert('Please enter text to ask AI about.');
   867→        stopTimer();
   868→        return;
   869→    }
   870→
   871→    try {
   872→        const response = await fetch('/api/v1/ask_ai', {
   873→            method: 'POST',
   874→            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   875→            body: JSON.stringify({ text: inputText })
   876→        });
   877→
   878→        if (!response.ok) throw new Error('AI request failed');
   879→
   880→        const result = await response.json();
   881→        enhancedTranscript.value = result.answer;
   882→        if (!isMobileDevice()) copyToClipboard(result.answer, copyEnhancedButton);
   883→        stopTimer();
   884→
   885→    } catch (error) {
   886→        console.error('Error:', error);
   887→        alert('Error asking AI');
   888→        stopTimer();
   889→    }
   890→};
   891→
   892→if (correctnessButton) correctnessButton.onclick = async () => {
   893→    startTimer();
   894→    const inputText = transcript.value.trim();
   895→    if (!inputText) {
   896→        alert('Please enter text to check for correctness.');
   897→        stopTimer();
   898→        return;
   899→    }
   900→
   901→    try {
   902→        const response = await fetch('/api/v1/correctness', {
   903→            method: 'POST',
   904→            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   905→            body: JSON.stringify({ text: inputText })
   906→        });
   907→
   908→        if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Correctness check failed');
   909→
   910→        const reader = response.body.getReader();
   911→        const decoder = new TextDecoder();
   912→        let fullText = '';
   913→
   914→        while (true) {
   915→            const { done, value } = await reader.read();
   916→            if (done) break;
   917→            fullText += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
   918→            enhancedTranscript.value = fullText;
   919→            enhancedTranscript.scrollTop = enhancedTranscript.scrollHeight;
   920→        }
   921→
   922→        if (!isMobileDevice()) copyToClipboard(fullText, copyEnhancedButton);
   923→        stopTimer();
   924→
   925→    } catch (error) {
   926→        console.error('Error:', error);
   927→        alert('Error checking correctness');
   928→        stopTimer();
   929→    }
   930→};
   931→
   932→// Theme handling
   933→function toggleTheme() {
   934→    const body = document.body;
   935→    const themeToggle = document.getElementById('themeToggle');
   936→    const isDarkTheme = body.classList.toggle('dark-theme');
   937→    
   938→    // Update button text
   939→    themeToggle.textContent = isDarkTheme ? '☀️' : '🌙';
   940→    
   941→    // Save preference to localStorage
   942→    localStorage.setItem('darkTheme', isDarkTheme);
   943→}
   944→
   945→// Initialize theme from saved preference
   946→function initializeTheme() {
   947→    const darkTheme = localStorage.getItem('darkTheme') === 'true';
   948→    const themeToggle = document.getElementById('themeToggle');
   949→    
   950→    if (darkTheme) {
   951→        document.body.classList.add('dark-theme');
   952→        themeToggle.textContent = '☀️';
   953→    }
   954→}
   955→
   956→// Add to your existing event listeners
   957→document.getElementById('themeToggle').onclick = toggleTheme;
   958→

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

  "content": {
