SUCCESS 
     1→'use strict';
     2→
     3→/* ===== DOM refs ===== */
     4→const quickBtn      = document.getElementById('quick-btn');
     5→const quickRing     = document.getElementById('quick-ring');
     6→const brainstormBtn = document.getElementById('brainstorm-btn');
     7→const brainstormRing = document.getElementById('brainstorm-ring');
     8→const micHint       = document.getElementById('mic-hint');
     9→const liveTranscript = document.getElementById('live-transcript');
    10→const liveText      = document.getElementById('live-text');
    11→const transcriptBar = document.getElementById('transcript-bar');
    12→const transcriptText = document.getElementById('transcript-text');
    13→const sendBtn       = document.getElementById('send-btn');
    14→const discardBtn    = document.getElementById('discard-btn');
    15→const transcriptCleanedLabel = document.getElementById('transcript-cleaned-label');
    16→const transcriptRawWrap = document.getElementById('transcript-raw-wrap');
    17→const transcriptRawText = document.getElementById('transcript-raw-text');
    18→const messagesEl    = document.getElementById('messages');
    19→const messagesEmpty = document.getElementById('messages-empty');
    20→const notSupported  = document.getElementById('not-supported');
    21→const settingsBtn   = document.getElementById('settings-btn');
    22→const modalOverlay  = document.getElementById('modal-overlay');
    23→const modalClose    = document.getElementById('modal-close');
    24→const webhookInput  = document.getElementById('webhook-url');
    25→const langSelect    = document.getElementById('lang-select');
    26→const saveSettings  = document.getElementById('save-settings');
    27→const summarizeInput = document.getElementById('summarize-url');
    28→const wakeBtn       = document.getElementById('wake-btn');
    29→
    30→/* ===== State ===== */
    31→let recognition     = null;
    32→let isListening     = false;
    33→let activeMode      = null; // 'quick' | 'brainstorm' | null
    34→let finalTranscript = '';
    35→let interimText     = '';
    36→let silenceTimer    = null;
    37→const SILENCE_DELAY = 3500; // ms — only used in quick mode
    38→
    39→/* ===== Brainstorm summary state ===== */
    40→let _pendingSummary = null; // Promise resolving to summarized text, or null
    41→
    42→/* ===== Transcript cleaning ===== */
    43→function cleanTranscript(raw) {
    44→  if (!raw) return raw;
    45→
    46→  // Strip obvious spoken filler sounds
    47→  let text = raw.replace(/\b(um+|uh+|er+|hmm+|mhm)\b\s*/gi, ' ');
    48→
    49→  // Collapse multiple whitespace
    50→  text = text.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
    51→
    52→  // Capitalize first letter
    53→  if (text) {
    54→    text = text.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + text.slice(1);
    55→  }
    56→
    57→  // Capitalize first letter after sentence-ending punctuation
    58→  text = text.replace(/([.!?])\s+([a-z])/g, (_, p, l) => `${p} ${l.toUpperCase()}`);
    59→
    60→  // Add terminal period if absent
    61→  if (text && !/[.!?…]$/.test(text)) {
    62→    text += '.';
    63→  }
    64→
    65→  return text;
    66→}
    67→
    68→/* ===== Brainstorm post-processing ===== */
    69→async function summarizeBrainstorm(rawText) {
    70→  const endpoint = localStorage.getItem('summarizeUrl') || '';
    71→  if (!endpoint) return cleanTranscript(rawText);
    72→
    73→  try {
    74→    const res = await fetch(endpoint, {
    75→      method: 'POST',
    76→      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    77→      body: JSON.stringify({ text: rawText }),
    78→    });
    79→    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);
    80→    const data = await res.json();
    81→    const summary = (data.summary || data.text || '').trim();
    82→    return summary || cleanTranscript(rawText);
    83→  } catch (err) {
    84→    console.warn('Summarize error:', err);
    85→    return cleanTranscript(rawText);
    86→  }
    87→}
    88→
    89→/* ===== Brainstorm continuity ===== */
    90→// Chrome stops continuous recognition periodically; we restart seamlessly in brainstorm mode
    91→// and preserve accumulated transcript across restarts.
    92→let brainstormAccumulator  = '';
    93→let _brainstormRestarting  = false;
    94→
    95→/* ===== Wake word state ===== */
    96→let wakeRecognition       = null;
    97→let wakeMode              = false;
    98→let wakeTriggered         = false; // transitioning from wake → main recording
    99→let wakeTriggeredRecording = false; // current recording was initiated by wake word
   100→let wakeRestartTimer      = null;
   101→const WAKE_PHRASES        = ['hey chill', 'hey chil']; // core phrase + common partial
   102→
   103→/* ===== Audio Feedback ===== */
   104→let audioCtx = null;
   105→
   106→function getAudioContext() {
   107→  if (!audioCtx) {
   108→    audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
   109→  }
   110→  if (audioCtx.state === 'suspended') {
   111→    audioCtx.resume();
   112→  }
   113→  return audioCtx;
   114→}
   115→
   116→// Prime the AudioContext on first user interaction so it's ready for hands-free sends
   117→function primeAudio() {
   118→  try { getAudioContext(); } catch (_) {}
   119→}
   120→
   121→function _playTone(ctx, frequency, startTime, duration, gain) {
   122→  const osc  = ctx.createOscillator();
   123→  const amp  = ctx.createGain();
   124→  osc.connect(amp);
   125→  amp.connect(ctx.destination);
   126→  osc.type = 'sine';
   127→  osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(frequency, startTime);
   128→  amp.gain.setValueAtTime(0, startTime);
   129→  amp.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(gain, startTime + 0.01);
   130→  amp.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, startTime + duration);
   131→  osc.start(startTime);
   132→  osc.stop(startTime + duration);
   133→}
   134→
   135→function playSuccessSound() {
   136→  // Prefer speech synthesis — "Got it" is immediately understood
   137→  if ('speechSynthesis' in window) {
   138→    const utt = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance('Got it');
   139→    utt.rate   = 1.1;
   140→    utt.pitch  = 1.1;
   141→    utt.volume = 1;
   142→    window.speechSynthesis.speak(utt);
   143→    return;
   144→  }
   145→  // Fallback: ascending double chime
   146→  try {
   147→    const ctx = getAudioContext();
   148→    const now = ctx.currentTime;
   149→    _playTone(ctx, 880,  now,        0.22, 0.30); // A5
   150→    _playTone(ctx, 1320, now + 0.18, 0.38, 0.25); // E6
   151→  } catch (e) {
   152→    console.warn('Audio playback failed:', e);
   153→  }
   154→}
   155→
   156→function playFailureSound() {
   157→  // Descending dissonant triple-tone — distinct "uh-oh" signal
   158→  try {
   159→    const ctx = getAudioContext();
   160→    const now = ctx.currentTime;
   161→    _playTone(ctx, 330, now,        0.18, 0.40); // E4
   162→    _playTone(ctx, 262, now + 0.15, 0.18, 0.40); // C4
   163→    _playTone(ctx, 196, now + 0.30, 0.45, 0.35); // G3
   164→  } catch (e) {
   165→    console.warn('Audio playback failed:', e);
   166→  }
   167→}
   168→
   169→/* ===== Service Worker ===== */
   170→if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) {
   171→  navigator.serviceWorker.register('sw.js').catch(() => {/* silent */});
   172→}
   173→
   174→/* ===== Language preference ===== */
   175→function getRecognitionLang() {
   176→  return localStorage.getItem('recognitionLang') || navigator.language || 'en-US';
   177→}
   178→
   179→/* ===== Speech Recognition setup ===== */
   180→const SpeechRecognition = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition;
   181→
   182→if (!SpeechRecognition) {
   183→  notSupported.hidden = false;
   184→  quickBtn.disabled = true;
   185→  quickBtn.setAttribute('aria-disabled', 'true');
   186→  brainstormBtn.disabled = true;
   187→  brainstormBtn.setAttribute('aria-disabled', 'true');
   188→} else {
   189→  initRecognition();
   190→}
   191→
   192→function initRecognition() {
   193→  recognition = new SpeechRecognition();
   194→  recognition.continuous     = true;
   195→  recognition.interimResults = true;
   196→  recognition.lang           = getRecognitionLang();
   197→  recognition.maxAlternatives = 1;
   198→
   199→  recognition.onstart = () => {
   200→    if (_brainstormRestarting) {
   201→      // Seamless brainstorm restart — preserve accumulated transcript, don't reset UI
   202→      isListening = true;
   203→      finalTranscript = brainstormAccumulator;
   204→      interimText = '';
   205→      _brainstormRestarting = false;
   206→      return;
   207→    }
   208→    isListening = true;
   209→    finalTranscript = '';
   210→    brainstormAccumulator = '';
   211→    interimText = '';
   212→    setRecordingUI(true, activeMode);
   213→  };
   214→
   215→  recognition.onresult = (event) => {
   216→    let interim = '';
   217→    for (let i = event.resultIndex; i < event.results.length; i++) {
   218→      const result = event.results[i];
   219→      if (result.isFinal) {
   220→        finalTranscript += result[0].transcript + ' ';
   221→      } else {
   222→        interim += result[0].transcript;
   223→      }
   224→    }
   225→    interimText = interim;
   226→    const displayText = (finalTranscript + interim).trim();
   227→    updateLiveText(displayText);
   228→
   229→    // Silence timer only applies to quick mode
   230→    if (activeMode === 'quick') {
   231→      resetSilenceTimer();
   232→    }
   233→  };
   234→
   235→  recognition.onerror = (event) => {
   236→    // 'no-speech' is common and expected — just stop cleanly
   237→    if (event.error !== 'no-speech') {
   238→      console.warn('Speech recognition error:', event.error);
   239→    }
   240→    _brainstormRestarting = false;
   241→    stopListening();
   242→  };
   243→
   244→  recognition.onend = () => {
   245→    if (isListening && activeMode === 'brainstorm') {
   246→      // Chrome stops continuous recognition periodically — restart seamlessly
   247→      brainstormAccumulator = finalTranscript;
   248→      _brainstormRestarting = true;
   249→      setTimeout(() => {
   250→        if (isListening && activeMode === 'brainstorm') {
   251→          try {
   252→            recognition.start();
   253→          } catch (_) {
   254→            _brainstormRestarting = false;
   255→            brainstormAccumulator = '';
   256→            isListening = false;
   257→            finishRecording();
   258→          }
   259→        } else {
   260→          _brainstormRestarting = false;
   261→        }
   262→      }, 150);
   263→      return;
   264→    }
   265→    // onend fires when recognition stops for any reason
   266→    if (isListening) {
   267→      // We didn't call stop manually yet; auto-stop happened
   268→      finishRecording();
   269→    }
   270→  };
   271→}
   272→
   273→function resetSilenceTimer() {
   274→  clearTimeout(silenceTimer);
   275→  silenceTimer = setTimeout(() => {
   276→    if (isListening) stopListening();
   277→  }, SILENCE_DELAY);
   278→}
   279→
   280→/* ===== Recording controls ===== */
   281→function startListening(mode) {
   282→  if (!recognition || isListening) return;
   283→  activeMode = mode;
   284→  hideTranscriptBar();
   285→
   286→  // Ensure wake recognition is stopped before starting main recording
   287→  if (wakeMode) stopWakeRecognition();
   288→
   289→  try {
   290→    recognition.start();
   291→  } catch (e) {
   292→    console.warn('Could not start recognition:', e);
   293→    // Re-init in case of invalid state
   294→    initRecognition();
   295→    try { recognition.start(); } catch (_) {}
   296→  }
   297→
   298→  if (mode === 'quick') {
   299→    resetSilenceTimer();
   300→  }
   301→}
   302→
   303→function stopListening() {
   304→  clearTimeout(silenceTimer);
   305→  _brainstormRestarting = false; // prevent auto-restart in brainstorm
   306→  isListening = false; // mark before calling stop so onend doesn't re-trigger finishRecording
   307→  if (recognition) {
   308→    try { recognition.stop(); } catch (_) {}
   309→  }
   310→  finishRecording();
   311→}
   312→
   313→function finishRecording() {
   314→  const mode = activeMode;
   315→  setRecordingUI(false, mode);
   316→  const text = finalTranscript.trim();
   317→  brainstormAccumulator = '';
   318→  activeMode = null;
   319→  if (text) {
   320→    if (wakeTriggeredRecording) {
   321→      // Hands-free path: auto-send without requiring a tap
   322→      sendMessage(text);
   323→    } else {
   324→      showTranscriptBar(text, mode);
   325→    }
   326→  }
   327→  wakeTriggeredRecording = false;
   328→  // Resume passive wake word listening if mode is active
   329→  if (wakeMode) scheduleWakeRestart();
   330→  updateWakeHint();
   331→}
   332→
   333→/* ===== UI state helpers ===== */
   334→function setRecordingUI(recording, mode) {
   335→  const quickActive      = recording && mode === 'quick';
   336→  const brainstormActive = recording && mode === 'brainstorm';
   337→
   338→  // Quick button
   339→  quickBtn.classList.toggle('recording', quickActive);
   340→  quickRing.classList.toggle('recording', quickActive);
   341→  quickBtn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', quickActive ? 'true' : 'false');
   342→  quickBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', quickActive ? 'Stop recording' : 'Quick Request – tap to speak');
   343→
   344→  // Brainstorm button
   345→  brainstormBtn.classList.toggle('recording', brainstormActive);
   346→  brainstormRing.classList.toggle('recording', brainstormActive);
   347→  brainstormBtn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', brainstormActive ? 'true' : 'false');
   348→  brainstormBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', brainstormActive ? 'Stop brainstorm recording' : 'Brainstorm – tap for continuous recording');
   349→
   350→  // Shared hint
   351→  if (quickActive) {
   352→    micHint.textContent = 'Listening… tap Quick to stop';
   353→    micHint.classList.add('active');
   354→    micHint.classList.remove('brainstorm-active');
   355→  } else if (brainstormActive) {
   356→    micHint.textContent = 'Recording… tap Brainstorm to stop';
   357→    micHint.classList.add('active', 'brainstorm-active');
   358→  } else {
   359→    micHint.classList.remove('active', 'brainstorm-active');
   360→    updateWakeHint();
   361→  }
   362→
   363→  liveTranscript.hidden = !recording;
   364→  liveTranscript.classList.toggle('brainstorm-mode', recording && mode === 'brainstorm');
   365→  if (!recording) {
   366→    liveText.textContent = 'Listening…';
   367→    liveText.classList.remove('has-text');
   368→  }
   369→}
   370→
   371→function updateLiveText(text) {
   372→  if (text) {
   373→    liveText.textContent = text;
   374→    liveText.classList.add('has-text');
   375→    // Auto-scroll to bottom so latest speech is always visible in brainstorm
   376→    if (activeMode === 'brainstorm') {
   377→      liveTranscript.scrollTop = liveTranscript.scrollHeight;
   378→    }
   379→  } else {
   380→    liveText.textContent = 'Listening…';
   381→    liveText.classList.remove('has-text');
   382→  }
   383→}
   384→
   385→function showTranscriptBar(text, mode) {
   386→  if (mode === 'brainstorm') {
   387→    transcriptRawText.textContent = text;
   388→    transcriptCleanedLabel.hidden = false;
   389→    transcriptRawWrap.hidden = false;
   390→
   391→    const endpoint = localStorage.getItem('summarizeUrl') || '';
   392→    if (endpoint) {
   393→      // Async path: show processing state, await AI summary
   394→      transcriptText.textContent = 'Processing…';
   395→      transcriptText.classList.add('processing');
   396→      sendBtn.disabled = true;
   397→
   398→      _pendingSummary = summarizeBrainstorm(text).then(summary => {
   399→        // Only update if the transcript bar is still showing this result
   400→        if (!transcriptBar.hidden) {
   401→          transcriptText.textContent = summary;
   402→          transcriptText.classList.remove('processing');
   403→          sendBtn.disabled = false;
   404→        }
   405→        _pendingSummary = null;
   406→      });
   407→    } else {
   408→      // Sync path: local regex cleanup
   409→      transcriptText.textContent = cleanTranscript(text);
   410→      transcriptText.classList.remove('processing');
   411→      _pendingSummary = null;
   412→    }
   413→  } else {
   414→    transcriptText.textContent = text;
   415→    transcriptText.classList.remove('processing');
   416→    transcriptCleanedLabel.hidden = true;
   417→    transcriptRawWrap.hidden = true;
   418→    _pendingSummary = null;
   419→  }
   420→  transcriptBar.hidden = false;
   421→}
   422→
   423→function hideTranscriptBar() {
   424→  transcriptBar.hidden = true;
   425→  transcriptText.textContent = '';
   426→  transcriptText.classList.remove('processing');
   427→  transcriptRawText.textContent = '';
   428→  transcriptCleanedLabel.hidden = true;
   429→  transcriptRawWrap.hidden = true;
   430→  sendBtn.disabled = false;
   431→  _pendingSummary = null;
   432→}
   433→
   434→/* ===== Button click handlers ===== */
   435→quickBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
   436→  primeAudio();
   437→  if (isListening && activeMode === 'quick') {
   438→    stopListening();
   439→  } else if (!isListening) {
   440→    wakeTriggeredRecording = false; // manual tap — show transcript bar after
   441→    startListening('quick');
   442→  }
   443→});
   444→
   445→brainstormBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
   446→  primeAudio();
   447→  if (isListening && activeMode === 'brainstorm') {
   448→    stopListening();
   449→  } else if (!isListening) {
   450→    wakeTriggeredRecording = false;
   451→    startListening('brainstorm');
   452→  }
   453→});
   454→
   455→/* ===== Send / Discard ===== */
   456→sendBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
   457→  primeAudio();
   458→  const text = transcriptText.textContent.trim();
   459→  if (!text) return;
   460→  hideTranscriptBar();
   461→  await sendMessage(text);
   462→});
   463→
   464→discardBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
   465→  hideTranscriptBar();
   466→});
   467→
   468→/* ===== Webhook send ===== */
   469→async function sendMessage(text) {
   470→  const webhookUrl = localStorage.getItem('webhookUrl') || '';
   471→  const timestamp  = new Date().toISOString();
   472→  const payload    = { text, source: 'hey-chill', timestamp };
   473→
   474→  // Add message to history immediately
   475→  const msgEl = addMessage(text, timestamp, 'sending');
   476→
   477→  if (!webhookUrl) {
   478→    updateMessageStatus(msgEl, 'no-webhook');
   479→    return;
   480→  }
   481→
   482→  try {
   483→    const res = await fetch(webhookUrl, {
   484→      method: 'POST',
   485→      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   486→      body: JSON.stringify(payload),
   487→    });
   488→    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);
   489→    updateMessageStatus(msgEl, 'sent');
   490→    playSuccessSound();
   491→  } catch (err) {
   492→    console.warn('Webhook error:', err);
   493→    updateMessageStatus(msgEl, 'error');
   494→    playFailureSound();
   495→  }
   496→}
   497→
   498→/* ===== Message history ===== */
   499→function addMessage(text, timestamp, status) {
   500→  // Hide empty state
   501→  messagesEmpty.style.display = 'none';
   502→
   503→  const el = document.createElement('div');
   504→  el.className = `message ${status}`;
   505→
   506→  const timeStr = new Date(timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], {
   507→    hour: '2-digit',
   508→    minute: '2-digit',
   509→  });
   510→
   511→  const statusLabel = {
   512→    sending:    'Sending…',
   513→    sent:       'Sent',
   514→    error:      'Failed',
   515→    'no-webhook': 'No webhook',
   516→  };
   517→
   518→  el.innerHTML = `
   519→    <p class="message-text">${escapeHtml(text)}</p>
   520→    <div class="message-meta">
   521→      <span class="message-time">${timeStr}</span>
   522→      <span class="message-status">${statusLabel[status] || status}</span>
   523→    </div>
   524→  `;
   525→
   526→  messagesEl.appendChild(el);
   527→  el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'end' });
   528→  return el;
   529→}
   530→
   531→function updateMessageStatus(el, status) {
   532→  el.className = `message ${status}`;
   533→  const statusEl = el.querySelector('.message-status');
   534→  const labels = {
   535→    sent:         'Sent',
   536→    error:        'Failed',
   537→    'no-webhook': 'No webhook set',
   538→  };
   539→  if (statusEl) statusEl.textContent = labels[status] || status;
   540→}
   541→
   542→function escapeHtml(str) {
   543→  return str
   544→    .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
   545→    .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
   546→    .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
   547→    .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
   548→    .replace(/'/g, '&#39;');
   549→}
   550→
   551→/* ===== Settings modal ===== */
   552→settingsBtn.addEventListener('click', openSettings);
   553→modalClose.addEventListener('click',  closeSettings);
   554→modalOverlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
   555→  if (e.target === modalOverlay) closeSettings();
   556→});
   557→
   558→document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
   559→  if (e.key === 'Escape') closeSettings();
   560→});
   561→
   562→saveSettings.addEventListener('click', () => {
   563→  const url = webhookInput.value.trim();
   564→  localStorage.setItem('webhookUrl', url);
   565→
   566→  const summarizeUrl = summarizeInput.value.trim();
   567→  if (summarizeUrl) {
   568→    localStorage.setItem('summarizeUrl', summarizeUrl);
   569→  } else {
   570→    localStorage.removeItem('summarizeUrl');
   571→  }
   572→
   573→  const lang = langSelect.value;
   574→  const prevLang = localStorage.getItem('recognitionLang') || '';
   575→  if (lang !== prevLang) {
   576→    if (lang) {
   577→      localStorage.setItem('recognitionLang', lang);
   578→    } else {
   579→      localStorage.removeItem('recognitionLang');
   580→    }
   581→    // Re-init recognition so the new language takes effect immediately
   582→    if (!isListening) {
   583→      initRecognition();
   584→      if (wakeMode) {
   585→        stopWakeRecognition();
   586→        wakeRecognition = null;
   587→        scheduleWakeRestart();
   588→      }
   589→    }
   590→  }
   591→
   592→  closeSettings();
   593→});
   594→
   595→function openSettings() {
   596→  webhookInput.value    = localStorage.getItem('webhookUrl') || '';
   597→  summarizeInput.value  = localStorage.getItem('summarizeUrl') || '';
   598→  langSelect.value      = localStorage.getItem('recognitionLang') || '';
   599→  modalOverlay.hidden   = false;
   600→  webhookInput.focus();
   601→}
   602→
   603→function closeSettings() {
   604→  modalOverlay.hidden = true;
   605→}
   606→
   607→/* ===== Wake Word Detection ===== */
   608→
   609→function isWakePhrase(transcript) {
   610→  return WAKE_PHRASES.some(phrase => transcript.includes(phrase));
   611→}
   612→
   613→function initWakeRecognition() {
   614→  wakeRecognition = new SpeechRecognition();
   615→  wakeRecognition.continuous     = true;
   616→  wakeRecognition.interimResults = true;
   617→  wakeRecognition.lang           = getRecognitionLang();
   618→  wakeRecognition.maxAlternatives = 1;
   619→
   620→  wakeRecognition.onresult = (event) => {
   621→    for (let i = event.resultIndex; i < event.results.length; i++) {
   622→      const transcript = event.results[i][0].transcript.toLowerCase().trim();
   623→      if (isWakePhrase(transcript)) {
   624→        handleWakeWordDetected();
   625→        return;
   626→      }
   627→    }
   628→  };
   629→
   630→  wakeRecognition.onerror = (event) => {
   631→    if (event.error === 'not-allowed' || event.error === 'service-not-allowed') {
   632→      // Microphone access denied — silently disable wake mode
   633→      disableWakeMode();
   634→      return;
   635→    }
   636→    if (wakeMode && !isListening && !wakeTriggered) {
   637→      scheduleWakeRestart();
   638→    }
   639→  };
   640→
   641→  wakeRecognition.onend = () => {
   642→    // Chrome stops continuous recognition periodically — restart unless we
   643→    // deliberately stopped it to hand off to main recording.
   644→    if (wakeMode && !isListening && !wakeTriggered) {
   645→      scheduleWakeRestart();
   646→    }
   647→  };
   648→}
   649→
   650→function startWakeRecognition() {
   651→  if (!wakeRecognition) initWakeRecognition();
   652→  wakeTriggered = false;
   653→  quickRing.classList.add('listening-passive'); // passive glow on quick button only
   654→  try {
   655→    wakeRecognition.start();
   656→  } catch (e) {
   657→    // InvalidStateError when already started — reinit and retry
   658→    initWakeRecognition();
   659→    try { wakeRecognition.start(); } catch (_) {}
   660→  }
   661→}
   662→
   663→function stopWakeRecognition() {
   664→  quickRing.classList.remove('listening-passive');
   665→  if (wakeRecognition) {
   666→    try { wakeRecognition.stop(); } catch (_) {}
   667→  }
   668→}
   669→
   670→function scheduleWakeRestart() {
   671→  clearTimeout(wakeRestartTimer);
   672→  wakeRestartTimer = setTimeout(() => {
   673→    if (wakeMode && !isListening && !wakeTriggered) {
   674→      startWakeRecognition();
   675→    }
   676→  }, 300);
   677→}
   678→
   679→function handleWakeWordDetected() {
   680→  if (isListening || wakeTriggered) return;
   681→  wakeTriggered = true;
   682→  wakeTriggeredRecording = true; // flag so finishRecording auto-sends
   683→  stopWakeRecognition();
   684→  // Give the recognition engine a moment to fully stop before starting main recording
   685→  setTimeout(() => {
   686→    wakeTriggered = false;
   687→    startListening('quick'); // wake word always triggers quick mode
   688→  }, 250);
   689→}
   690→
   691→function enableWakeMode() {
   692→  wakeMode = true;
   693→  wakeBtn.classList.add('wake-active');
   694→  wakeBtn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', 'true');
   695→  wakeBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Disable wake word');
   696→  wakeBtn.title = 'Wake word: ON';
   697→  localStorage.setItem('wakeMode', '1');
   698→  updateWakeHint();
   699→  if (!isListening) startWakeRecognition();
   700→}
   701→
   702→function disableWakeMode() {
   703→  wakeMode = false;
   704→  wakeBtn.classList.remove('wake-active');
   705→  wakeBtn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', 'false');
   706→  wakeBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Enable wake word');
   707→  wakeBtn.title = 'Wake word: Hey Chill';
   708→  localStorage.setItem('wakeMode', '0');
   709→  clearTimeout(wakeRestartTimer);
   710→  stopWakeRecognition();
   711→  updateWakeHint();
   712→}
   713→
   714→function updateWakeHint() {
   715→  if (!isListening) {
   716→    micHint.textContent = wakeMode ? 'Say "Hey Chill" or tap Quick' : '';
   717→    micHint.classList.remove('active', 'brainstorm-active');
   718→  }
   719→}
   720→
   721→wakeBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
   722→  primeAudio();
   723→  if (wakeMode) {
   724→    disableWakeMode();
   725→  } else {
   726→    enableWakeMode();
   727→  }
   728→});
   729→
   730→// Restore wake mode preference across sessions
   731→if (SpeechRecognition && localStorage.getItem('wakeMode') === '1') {
   732→  enableWakeMode();
   733→}
   734→

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

{
  "content": {
    "tool_use_id": "toolu_0111WyPgXUp7PVw23ayUgKH9",
    "type": "tool_result",
    "content": "     1\u2192'use strict';\n     2\u2192\n     3\u2192/* ===== DOM refs ===== */\n     4\u2192const quickBtn      = document.getElementById('quick-btn');\n     5\u2192const quickRing     = document.getElementById('quick-ring');\n     6\u2192const brainstormBtn = document.getElementById('brainstorm-btn');\n     7\u2192const brainstormRing = document.getElementById('brainstorm-ring');\n     8\u2192const micHint       = document.getElementById('mic-hint');\n     9\u2192const liveTranscript = document.getElementById('live-transcript');\n    10\u2192const liveText      = document.getElementById('live-text');\n    11\u2192const transcriptBar = document.getElementById('transcript-bar');\n    12\u2192const transcriptText = document.getElementById('transcript-text');\n    13\u2192const sendBtn       = document.getElementById('send-btn');\n    14\u2192const discardBtn    = document.getElementById('discard-btn');\n    15\u2192const transcriptCleanedLabel = document.getElementById('transcript-cleaned-label');\n    16\u2192const transcriptRawWrap = document.getElementById('transcript-raw-wrap');\n    17\u2192const transcriptRawText = document.getElementById('transcript-raw-text');\n    18\u2192const messagesEl    = document.getElementById('messages');\n    19\u2192const messagesEmpty = document.getElementById('messages-empty');\n    20\u2192const notSupported  = document.getElementById('not-supported');\n    21\u2192const settingsBtn   = document.getElementById('settings-btn');\n    22\u2192const modalOverlay  = document.getElementById('modal-overlay');\n    23\u2192const modalClose    = document.getElementById('modal-close');\n    24\u2192const webhookInput  = document.getElementById('webhook-url');\n    25\u2192const langSelect    = document.getElementById('lang-select');\n    26\u2192const saveSettings  = document.getElementById('save-settings');\n    27\u2192const summarizeInput = document.getElementById('summarize-url');\n    28\u2192const wakeBtn       = document.getElementById('wake-btn');\n    29\u2192\n    30\u2192/* ===== State ===== */\n    31\u2192let recognition     = null;\n    32\u2192let isListening     = false;\n    33\u2192let activeMode      = null; // 'quick' | 'brainstorm' | null\n    34\u2192let finalTranscript = '';\n    35\u2192let interimText     = '';\n    36\u2192let silenceTimer    = null;\n    37\u2192const SILENCE_DELAY = 3500; // ms \u2014 only used in quick mode\n    38\u2192\n    39\u2192/* ===== Brainstorm summary state ===== */\n    40\u2192let _pendingSummary = null; // Promise resolving to summarized text, or null\n    41\u2192\n    42\u2192/* ===== Transcript cleaning ===== */\n    43\u2192function cleanTranscript(raw) {\n    44\u2192  if (!raw) return raw;\n    45\u2192\n    46\u2192  // Strip obvious spoken filler sounds\n    47\u2192  let text = raw.replace(/\\b(um+|uh+|er+|hmm+|mhm)\\b\\s*/gi, ' ');\n    48\u2192\n    49\u2192  // Collapse multiple whitespace\n    50\u2192  text = text.replace(/\\s+/g, ' ').trim();\n    51\u2192\n    52\u2192  // Capitalize first letter\n    53\u2192  if (text) {\n    54\u2192    text = text.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + text.slice(1);\n    55\u2192  }\n    56\u2192\n    57\u2192  // Capitalize first letter after sentence-ending punctuation\n    58\u2192  text = text.replace(/([.!?])\\s+([a-z])/g, (_, p, l) => `${p} ${l.toUpperCase()}`);\n    59\u2192\n    60\u2192  // Add terminal period if absent\n    61\u2192  if (text && !/[.!?\u2026]$/.test(text)) {\n    62\u2192    text += '.';\n    63\u2192  }\n    64\u2192\n    65\u2192  return text;\n    66\u2192}\n    67\u2192\n    68\u2192/* ===== Brainstorm post-processing ===== */\n    69\u2192async function summarizeBrainstorm(rawText) {\n    70\u2192  const endpoint = localStorage.getItem('summarizeUrl') || '';\n    71\u2192  if (!endpoint) return cleanTranscript(rawText);\n    72\u2192\n    73\u2192  try {\n    74\u2192    const res = await fetch(endpoint, {\n    75\u2192      method: 'POST',\n    76\u2192      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n    77\u2192      body: JSON.stringify({ text: rawText }),\n    78\u2192    });\n    79\u2192    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);\n    80\u2192    const data = await res.json();\n    81\u2192    const summary = (data.summary || data.text || '').trim();\n    82\u2192    return summary || cleanTranscript(rawText);\n    83\u2192  } catch (err) {\n    84\u2192    console.warn('Summarize error:', err);\n    85\u2192    return cleanTranscript(rawText);\n    86\u2192  }\n    87\u2192}\n    88\u2192\n    89\u2192/* ===== Brainstorm continuity ===== */\n    90\u2192// Chrome stops continuous recognition periodically; we restart seamlessly in brainstorm mode\n    91\u2192// and preserve accumulated transcript across restarts.\n    92\u2192let brainstormAccumulator  = '';\n    93\u2192let _brainstormRestarting  = false;\n    94\u2192\n    95\u2192/* ===== Wake word state ===== */\n    96\u2192let wakeRecognition       = null;\n    97\u2192let wakeMode              = false;\n    98\u2192let wakeTriggered         = false; // transitioning from wake \u2192 main recording\n    99\u2192let wakeTriggeredRecording = false; // current recording was initiated by wake word\n   100\u2192let wakeRestartTimer      = null;\n   101\u2192const WAKE_PHRASES        = ['hey chill', 'hey chil']; // core phrase + common partial\n   102\u2192\n   103\u2192/* ===== Audio Feedback ===== */\n   104\u2192let audioCtx = null;\n   105\u2192\n   106\u2192function getAudioContext() {\n   107\u2192  if (!audioCtx) {\n   108\u2192    audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();\n   109\u2192  }\n   110\u2192  if (audioCtx.state === 'suspended') {\n   111\u2192    audioCtx.resume();\n   112\u2192  }\n   113\u2192  return audioCtx;\n   114\u2192}\n   115\u2192\n   116\u2192// Prime the AudioContext on first user interaction so it's ready for hands-free sends\n   117\u2192function primeAudio() {\n   118\u2192  try { getAudioContext(); } catch (_) {}\n   119\u2192}\n   120\u2192\n   121\u2192function _playTone(ctx, frequency, startTime, duration, gain) {\n   122\u2192  const osc  = ctx.createOscillator();\n   123\u2192  const amp  = ctx.createGain();\n   124\u2192  osc.connect(amp);\n   125\u2192  amp.connect(ctx.destination);\n   126\u2192  osc.type = 'sine';\n   127\u2192  osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(frequency, startTime);\n   128\u2192  amp.gain.setValueAtTime(0, startTime);\n   129\u2192  amp.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(gain, startTime + 0.01);\n   130\u2192  amp.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, startTime + duration);\n   131\u2192  osc.start(startTime);\n   132\u2192  osc.stop(startTime + duration);\n   133\u2192}\n   134\u2192\n   135\u2192function playSuccessSound() {\n   136\u2192  // Prefer speech synthesis \u2014 \"Got it\" is immediately understood\n   137\u2192  if ('speechSynthesis' in window) {\n   138\u2192    const utt = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance('Got it');\n   139\u2192    utt.rate   = 1.1;\n   140\u2192    utt.pitch  = 1.1;\n   141\u2192    utt.volume = 1;\n   142\u2192    window.speechSynthesis.speak(utt);\n   143\u2192    return;\n   144\u2192  }\n   145\u2192  // Fallback: ascending double chime\n   146\u2192  try {\n   147\u2192    const ctx = getAudioContext();\n   148\u2192    const now = ctx.currentTime;\n   149\u2192    _playTone(ctx, 880,  now,        0.22, 0.30); // A5\n   150\u2192    _playTone(ctx, 1320, now + 0.18, 0.38, 0.25); // E6\n   151\u2192  } catch (e) {\n   152\u2192    console.warn('Audio playback failed:', e);\n   153\u2192  }\n   154\u2192}\n   155\u2192\n   156\u2192function playFailureSound() {\n   157\u2192  // Descending dissonant triple-tone \u2014 distinct \"uh-oh\" signal\n   158\u2192  try {\n   159\u2192    const ctx = getAudioContext();\n   160\u2192    const now = ctx.currentTime;\n   161\u2192    _playTone(ctx, 330, now,        0.18, 0.40); // E4\n   162\u2192    _playTone(ctx, 262, now + 0.15, 0.18, 0.40); // C4\n   163\u2192    _playTone(ctx, 196, now + 0.30, 0.45, 0.35); // G3\n   164\u2192  } catch (e) {\n   165\u2192    console.warn('Audio playback failed:', e);\n   166\u2192  }\n   167\u2192}\n   168\u2192\n   169\u2192/* ===== Service Worker ===== */\n   170\u2192if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) {\n   171\u2192  navigator.serviceWorker.register('sw.js').catch(() => {/* silent */});\n   172\u2192}\n   173\u2192\n   174\u2192/* ===== Language preference ===== */\n   175\u2192function getRecognitionLang() {\n   176\u2192  return localStorage.getItem('recognitionLang') || navigator.language || 'en-US';\n   177\u2192}\n   178\u2192\n   179\u2192/* ===== Speech Recognition setup ===== */\n   180\u2192const SpeechRecognition = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition;\n   181\u2192\n   182\u2192if (!SpeechRecognition) {\n   183\u2192  notSupported.hidden = false;\n   184\u2192  quickBtn.disabled = true;\n   185\u2192  quickBtn.setAttribute('aria-disabled', 'true');\n   186\u2192  brainstormBtn.disabled = true;\n   187\u2192  brainstormBtn.setAttribute('aria-disabled', 'true');\n   188\u2192} else {\n   189\u2192  initRecognition();\n   190\u2192}\n   191\u2192\n   192\u2192function initRecognition() {\n   193\u2192  recognition = new SpeechRecognition();\n   194\u2192  recognition.continuous     = true;\n   195\u2192  recognition.interimResults = true;\n   196\u2192  recognition.lang           = getRecognitionLang();\n   197\u2192  recognition.maxAlternatives = 1;\n   198\u2192\n   199\u2192  recognition.onstart = () => {\n   200\u2192    if (_brainstormRestarting) {\n   201\u2192      // Seamless brainstorm restart \u2014 preserve accumulated transcript, don't reset UI\n   202\u2192      isListening = true;\n   203\u2192      finalTranscript = brainstormAccumulator;\n   204\u2192      interimText = '';\n   205\u2192      _brainstormRestarting = false;\n   206\u2192      return;\n   207\u2192    }\n   208\u2192    isListening = true;\n   209\u2192    finalTranscript = '';\n   210\u2192    brainstormAccumulator = '';\n   211\u2192    interimText = '';\n   212\u2192    setRecordingUI(true, activeMode);\n   213\u2192  };\n   214\u2192\n   215\u2192  recognition.onresult = (event) => {\n   216\u2192    let interim = '';\n   217\u2192    for (let i = event.resultIndex; i < event.results.length; i++) {\n   218\u2192      const result = event.results[i];\n   219\u2192      if (result.isFinal) {\n   220\u2192        finalTranscript += result[0].transcript + ' ';\n   221\u2192      } else {\n   222\u2192        interim += result[0].transcript;\n   223\u2192      }\n   224\u2192    }\n   225\u2192    interimText = interim;\n   226\u2192    const displayText = (finalTranscript + interim).trim();\n   227\u2192    updateLiveText(displayText);\n   228\u2192\n   229\u2192    // Silence timer only applies to quick mode\n   230\u2192    if (activeMode === 'quick') {\n   231\u2192      resetSilenceTimer();\n   232\u2192    }\n   233\u2192  };\n   234\u2192\n   235\u2192  recognition.onerror = (event) => {\n   236\u2192    // 'no-speech' is common and expected \u2014 just stop cleanly\n   237\u2192    if (event.error !== 'no-speech') {\n   238\u2192      console.warn('Speech recognition error:', event.error);\n   239\u2192    }\n   240\u2192    _brainstormRestarting = false;\n   241\u2192    stopListening();\n   242\u2192  };\n   243\u2192\n   244\u2192  recognition.onend = () => {\n   245\u2192    if (isListening && activeMode === 'brainstorm') {\n   246\u2192      // Chrome stops continuous recognition periodically \u2014 restart seamlessly\n   247\u2192      brainstormAccumulator = finalTranscript;\n   248\u2192      _brainstormRestarting = true;\n   249\u2192      setTimeout(() => {\n   250\u2192        if (isListening && activeMode === 'brainstorm') {\n   251\u2192          try {\n   252\u2192            recognition.start();\n   253\u2192          } catch (_) {\n   254\u2192            _brainstormRestarting = false;\n   255\u2192            brainstormAccumulator = '';\n   256\u2192            isListening = false;\n   257\u2192            finishRecording();\n   258\u2192          }\n   259\u2192        } else {\n   260\u2192          _brainstormRestarting = false;\n   261\u2192        }\n   262\u2192      }, 150);\n   263\u2192      return;\n   264\u2192    }\n   265\u2192    // onend fires when recognition stops for any reason\n   266\u2192    if (isListening) {\n   267\u2192      // We didn't call stop manually yet; auto-stop happened\n   268\u2192      finishRecording();\n   269\u2192    }\n   270\u2192  };\n   271\u2192}\n   272\u2192\n   273\u2192function resetSilenceTimer() {\n   274\u2192  clearTimeout(silenceTimer);\n   275\u2192  silenceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n   276\u2192    if (isListening) stopListening();\n   277\u2192  }, SILENCE_DELAY);\n   278\u2192}\n   279\u2192\n   280\u2192/* ===== Recording controls ===== */\n   281\u2192function startListening(mode) {\n   282\u2192  if (!recognition || isListening) return;\n   283\u2192  activeMode = mode;\n   284\u2192  hideTranscriptBar();\n   285\u2192\n   286\u2192  // Ensure wake recognition is stopped before starting main recording\n   287\u2192  if (wakeMode) stopWakeRecognition();\n   288\u2192\n   289\u2192  try {\n   290\u2192    recognition.start();\n   291\u2192  } catch (e) {\n   292\u2192    console.warn('Could not start recognition:', e);\n   293\u2192    // Re-init in case of invalid state\n   294\u2192    initRecognition();\n   295\u2192    try { recognition.start(); } catch (_) {}\n   296\u2192  }\n   297\u2192\n   298\u2192  if (mode === 'quick') {\n   299\u2192    resetSilenceTimer();\n   300\u2192  }\n   301\u2192}\n   302\u2192\n   303\u2192function stopListening() {\n   304\u2192  clearTimeout(silenceTimer);\n   305\u2192  _brainstormRestarting = false; // prevent auto-restart in brainstorm\n   306\u2192  isListening = false; // mark before calling stop so onend doesn't re-trigger finishRecording\n   307\u2192  if (recognition) {\n   308\u2192    try { recognition.stop(); } catch (_) {}\n   309\u2192  }\n   310\u2192  finishRecording();\n   311\u2192}\n   312\u2192\n   313\u2192function finishRecording() {\n   314\u2192  const mode = activeMode;\n   315\u2192  setRecordingUI(false, mode);\n   316\u2192  const text = finalTranscript.trim();\n   317\u2192  brainstormAccumulator = '';\n   318\u2192  activeMode = null;\n   319\u2192  if (text) {\n   320\u2192    if (wakeTriggeredRecording) {\n   321\u2192      // Hands-free path: auto-send without requiring a tap\n   322\u2192      sendMessage(text);\n   323\u2192    } else {\n   324\u2192      showTranscriptBar(text, mode);\n   325\u2192    }\n   326\u2192  }\n   327\u2192  wakeTriggeredRecording = false;\n   328\u2192  // Resume passive wake word listening if mode is active\n   329\u2192  if (wakeMode) scheduleWakeRestart();\n   330\u2192  updateWakeHint();\n   331\u2192}\n   332\u2192\n   333\u2192/* ===== UI state helpers ===== */\n   334\u2192function setRecordingUI(recording, mode) {\n   335\u2192  const quickActive      = recording && mode === 'quick';\n   336\u2192  const brainstormActive = recording && mode === 'brainstorm';\n   337\u2192\n   338\u2192  // Quick button\n   339\u2192  quickBtn.classList.toggle('recording', quickActive);\n   340\u2192  quickRing.classList.toggle('recording', quickActive);\n   341\u2192  quickBtn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', quickActive ? 'true' : 'false');\n   342\u2192  quickBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', quickActive ? 'Stop recording' : 'Quick Request \u2013 tap to speak');\n   343\u2192\n   344\u2192  // Brainstorm button\n   345\u2192  brainstormBtn.classList.toggle('recording', brainstormActive);\n   346\u2192  brainstormRing.classList.toggle('recording', brainstormActive);\n   347\u2192  brainstormBtn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', brainstormActive ? 'true' : 'false');\n   348\u2192  brainstormBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', brainstormActive ? 'Stop brainstorm recording' : 'Brainstorm \u2013 tap for continuous recording');\n   349\u2192\n   350\u2192  // Shared hint\n   351\u2192  if (quickActive) {\n   352\u2192    micHint.textContent = 'Listening\u2026 tap Quick to stop';\n   353\u2192    micHint.classList.add('active');\n   354\u2192    micHint.classList.remove('brainstorm-active');\n   355\u2192  } else if (brainstormActive) {\n   356\u2192    micHint.textContent = 'Recording\u2026 tap Brainstorm to stop';\n   357\u2192    micHint.classList.add('active', 'brainstorm-active');\n   358\u2192  } else {\n   359\u2192    micHint.classList.remove('active', 'brainstorm-active');\n   360\u2192    updateWakeHint();\n   361\u2192  }\n   362\u2192\n   363\u2192  liveTranscript.hidden = !recording;\n   364\u2192  liveTranscript.classList.toggle('brainstorm-mode', recording && mode === 'brainstorm');\n   365\u2192  if (!recording) {\n   366\u2192    liveText.textContent = 'Listening\u2026';\n   367\u2192    liveText.classList.remove('has-text');\n   368\u2192  }\n   369\u2192}\n   370\u2192\n   371\u2192function updateLiveText(text) {\n   372\u2192  if (text) {\n   373\u2192    liveText.textContent = text;\n   374\u2192    liveText.classList.add('has-text');\n   375\u2192    // Auto-scroll to bottom so latest speech is always visible in brainstorm\n   376\u2192    if (activeMode === 'brainstorm') {\n   377\u2192      liveTranscript.scrollTop = liveTranscript.scrollHeight;\n   378\u2192    }\n   379\u2192  } else {\n   380\u2192    liveText.textContent = 'Listening\u2026';\n   381\u2192    liveText.classList.remove('has-text');\n   382\u2192  }\n   383\u2192}\n   384\u2192\n   385\u2192function showTranscriptBar(text, mode) {\n   386\u2192  if (mode === 'brainstorm') {\n   387\u2192    transcriptRawText.textContent = text;\n   388\u2192    transcriptCleanedLabel.hidden = false;\n   389\u2192    transcriptRawWrap.hidden = false;\n   390\u2192\n   391\u2192    const endpoint = localStorage.getItem('summarizeUrl') || '';\n   392\u2192    if (endpoint) {\n   393\u2192      // Async path: show processing state, await AI summary\n   394\u2192      transcriptText.textContent = 'Processing\u2026';\n   395\u2192      transcriptText.classList.add('processing');\n   396\u2192      sendBtn.disabled = true;\n   397\u2192\n   398\u2192      _pendingSummary = summarizeBrainstorm(text).then(summary => {\n   399\u2192        // Only update if the transcript bar is still showing this result\n   400\u2192        if (!transcriptBar.hidden) {\n   401\u2192          transcriptText.textContent = summary;\n   402\u2192          transcriptText.classList.remove('processing');\n   403\u2192          sendBtn.disabled = false;\n   404\u2192        }\n   405\u2192        _pendingSummary = null;\n   406\u2192      });\n   407\u2192    } else {\n   408\u2192      // Sync path: local regex cleanup\n   409\u2192      transcriptText.textContent = cleanTranscript(text);\n   410\u2192      transcriptText.classList.remove('processing');\n   411\u2192      _pendingSummary = null;\n   412\u2192    }\n   413\u2192  } else {\n   414\u2192    transcriptText.textContent = text;\n   415\u2192    transcriptText.classList.remove('processing');\n   416\u2192    transcriptCleanedLabel.hidden = true;\n   417\u2192    transcriptRawWrap.hidden = true;\n   418\u2192    _pendingSummary = null;\n   419\u2192  }\n   420\u2192  transcriptBar.hidden = false;\n   421\u2192}\n   422\u2192\n   423\u2192function hideTranscriptBar() {\n   424\u2192  transcriptBar.hidden = true;\n   425\u2192  transcriptText.textContent = '';\n   426\u2192  transcriptText.classList.remove('processing');\n   427\u2192  transcriptRawText.textContent = '';\n   428\u2192  transcriptCleanedLabel.hidden = true;\n   429\u2192  transcriptRawWrap.hidden = true;\n   430\u2192  sendBtn.disabled = false;\n   431\u2192  _pendingSummary = null;\n   432\u2192}\n   433\u2192\n   434\u2192/* ===== Button click handlers ===== */\n   435\u2192quickBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   436\u2192  primeAudio();\n   437\u2192  if (isListening && activeMode === 'quick') {\n   438\u2192    stopListening();\n   439\u2192  } else if (!isListening) {\n   440\u2192    wakeTriggeredRecording = false; // manual tap \u2014 show transcript bar after\n   441\u2192    startListening('quick');\n   442\u2192  }\n   443\u2192});\n   444\u2192\n   445\u2192brainstormBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   446\u2192  primeAudio();\n   447\u2192  if (isListening && activeMode === 'brainstorm') {\n   448\u2192    stopListening();\n   449\u2192  } else if (!isListening) {\n   450\u2192    wakeTriggeredRecording = false;\n   451\u2192    startListening('brainstorm');\n   452\u2192  }\n   453\u2192});\n   454\u2192\n   455\u2192/* ===== Send / Discard ===== */\n   456\u2192sendBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {\n   457\u2192  primeAudio();\n   458\u2192  const text = transcriptText.textContent.trim();\n   459\u2192  if (!text) return;\n   460\u2192  hideTranscriptBar();\n   461\u2192  await sendMessage(text);\n   462\u2192});\n   463\u2192\n   464\u2192discardBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   465\u2192  hideTranscriptBar();\n   466\u2192});\n   467\u2192\n   468\u2192/* ===== Webhook send ===== */\n   469\u2192async function sendMessage(text) {\n   470\u2192  const webhookUrl = localStorage.getItem('webhookUrl') || '';\n   471\u2192  const timestamp  = new Date().toISOString();\n   472\u2192  const payload    = { text, source: 'hey-chill', timestamp };\n   473\u2192\n   474\u2192  // Add message to history immediately\n   475\u2192  const msgEl = addMessage(text, timestamp, 'sending');\n   476\u2192\n   477\u2192  if (!webhookUrl) {\n   478\u2192    updateMessageStatus(msgEl, 'no-webhook');\n   479\u2192    return;\n   480\u2192  }\n   481\u2192\n   482\u2192  try {\n   483\u2192    const res = await fetch(webhookUrl, {\n   484\u2192      method: 'POST',\n   485\u2192      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n   486\u2192      body: JSON.stringify(payload),\n   487\u2192    });\n   488\u2192    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`);\n   489\u2192    updateMessageStatus(msgEl, 'sent');\n   490\u2192    playSuccessSound();\n   491\u2192  } catch (err) {\n   492\u2192    console.warn('Webhook error:', err);\n   493\u2192    updateMessageStatus(msgEl, 'error');\n   494\u2192    playFailureSound();\n   495\u2192  }\n   496\u2192}\n   497\u2192\n   498\u2192/* ===== Message history ===== */\n   499\u2192function addMessage(text, timestamp, status) {\n   500\u2192  // Hide empty state\n   501\u2192  messagesEmpty.style.display = 'none';\n   502\u2192\n   503\u2192  const el = document.createElement('div');\n   504\u2192  el.className = `message ${status}`;\n   505\u2192\n   506\u2192  const timeStr = new Date(timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], {\n   507\u2192    hour: '2-digit',\n   508\u2192    minute: '2-digit',\n   509\u2192  });\n   510\u2192\n   511\u2192  const statusLabel = {\n   512\u2192    sending:    'Sending\u2026',\n   513\u2192    sent:       'Sent',\n   514\u2192    error:      'Failed',\n   515\u2192    'no-webhook': 'No webhook',\n   516\u2192  };\n   517\u2192\n   518\u2192  el.innerHTML = `\n   519\u2192    <p class=\"message-text\">${escapeHtml(text)}</p>\n   520\u2192    <div class=\"message-meta\">\n   521\u2192      <span class=\"message-time\">${timeStr}</span>\n   522\u2192      <span class=\"message-status\">${statusLabel[status] || status}</span>\n   523\u2192    </div>\n   524\u2192  `;\n   525\u2192\n   526\u2192  messagesEl.appendChild(el);\n   527\u2192  el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'end' });\n   528\u2192  return el;\n   529\u2192}\n   530\u2192\n   531\u2192function updateMessageStatus(el, status) {\n   532\u2192  el.className = `message ${status}`;\n   533\u2192  const statusEl = el.querySelector('.message-status');\n   534\u2192  const labels = {\n   535\u2192    sent:         'Sent',\n   536\u2192    error:        'Failed',\n   537\u2192    'no-webhook': 'No webhook set',\n   538\u2192  };\n   539\u2192  if (statusEl) statusEl.textContent = labels[status] || status;\n   540\u2192}\n   541\u2192\n   542\u2192function escapeHtml(str) {\n   543\u2192  return str\n   544\u2192    .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')\n   545\u2192    .replace(/</g, '&lt;')\n   546\u2192    .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')\n   547\u2192    .replace(/\"/g, '&quot;')\n   548\u2192    .replace(/'/g, '&#39;');\n   549\u2192}\n   550\u2192\n   551\u2192/* ===== Settings modal ===== */\n   552\u2192settingsBtn.addEventListener('click', openSettings);\n   553\u2192modalClose.addEventListener('click',  closeSettings);\n   554\u2192modalOverlay.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n   555\u2192  if (e.target === modalOverlay) closeSettings();\n   556\u2192});\n   557\u2192\n   558\u2192document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {\n   559\u2192  if (e.key === 'Escape') closeSettings();\n   560\u2192});\n   561\u2192\n   562\u2192saveSettings.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   563\u2192  const url = webhookInput.value.trim();\n   564\u2192  localStorage.setItem('webhookUrl', url);\n   565\u2192\n   566\u2192  const summarizeUrl = summarizeInput.value.trim();\n   567\u2192  if (summarizeUrl) {\n   568\u2192    localStorage.setItem('summarizeUrl', summarizeUrl);\n   569\u2192  } else {\n   570\u2192    localStorage.removeItem('summarizeUrl');\n   571\u2192  }\n   572\u2192\n   573\u2192  const lang = langSelect.value;\n   574\u2192  const prevLang = localStorage.getItem('recognitionLang') || '';\n   575\u2192  if (lang !== prevLang) {\n   576\u2192    if (lang) {\n   577\u2192      localStorage.setItem('recognitionLang', lang);\n   578\u2192    } else {\n   579\u2192      localStorage.removeItem('recognitionLang');\n   580\u2192    }\n   581\u2192    // Re-init recognition so the new language takes effect immediately\n   582\u2192    if (!isListening) {\n   583\u2192      initRecognition();\n   584\u2192      if (wakeMode) {\n   585\u2192        stopWakeRecognition();\n   586\u2192        wakeRecognition = null;\n   587\u2192        scheduleWakeRestart();\n   588\u2192      }\n   589\u2192    }\n   590\u2192  }\n   591\u2192\n   592\u2192  closeSettings();\n   593\u2192});\n   594\u2192\n   595\u2192function openSettings() {\n   596\u2192  webhookInput.value    = localStorage.getItem('webhookUrl') || '';\n   597\u2192  summarizeInput.value  = localStorage.getItem('summarizeUrl') || '';\n   598\u2192  langSelect.value      = localStorage.getItem('recognitionLang') || '';\n   599\u2192  modalOverlay.hidden   = false;\n   600\u2192  webhookInput.focus();\n   601\u2192}\n   602\u2192\n   603\u2192function closeSettings() {\n   604\u2192  modalOverlay.hidden = true;\n   605\u2192}\n   606\u2192\n   607\u2192/* ===== Wake Word Detection ===== */\n   608\u2192\n   609\u2192function isWakePhrase(transcript) {\n   610\u2192  return WAKE_PHRASES.some(phrase => transcript.includes(phrase));\n   611\u2192}\n   612\u2192\n   613\u2192function initWakeRecognition() {\n   614\u2192  wakeRecognition = new SpeechRecognition();\n   615\u2192  wakeRecognition.continuous     = true;\n   616\u2192  wakeRecognition.interimResults = true;\n   617\u2192  wakeRecognition.lang           = getRecognitionLang();\n   618\u2192  wakeRecognition.maxAlternatives = 1;\n   619\u2192\n   620\u2192  wakeRecognition.onresult = (event) => {\n   621\u2192    for (let i = event.resultIndex; i < event.results.length; i++) {\n   622\u2192      const transcript = event.results[i][0].transcript.toLowerCase().trim();\n   623\u2192      if (isWakePhrase(transcript)) {\n   624\u2192        handleWakeWordDetected();\n   625\u2192        return;\n   626\u2192      }\n   627\u2192    }\n   628\u2192  };\n   629\u2192\n   630\u2192  wakeRecognition.onerror = (event) => {\n   631\u2192    if (event.error === 'not-allowed' || event.error === 'service-not-allowed') {\n   632\u2192      // Microphone access denied \u2014 silently disable wake mode\n   633\u2192      disableWakeMode();\n   634\u2192      return;\n   635\u2192    }\n   636\u2192    if (wakeMode && !isListening && !wakeTriggered) {\n   637\u2192      scheduleWakeRestart();\n   638\u2192    }\n   639\u2192  };\n   640\u2192\n   641\u2192  wakeRecognition.onend = () => {\n   642\u2192    // Chrome stops continuous recognition periodically \u2014 restart unless we\n   643\u2192    // deliberately stopped it to hand off to main recording.\n   644\u2192    if (wakeMode && !isListening && !wakeTriggered) {\n   645\u2192      scheduleWakeRestart();\n   646\u2192    }\n   647\u2192  };\n   648\u2192}\n   649\u2192\n   650\u2192function startWakeRecognition() {\n   651\u2192  if (!wakeRecognition) initWakeRecognition();\n   652\u2192  wakeTriggered = false;\n   653\u2192  quickRing.classList.add('listening-passive'); // passive glow on quick button only\n   654\u2192  try {\n   655\u2192    wakeRecognition.start();\n   656\u2192  } catch (e) {\n   657\u2192    // InvalidStateError when already started \u2014 reinit and retry\n   658\u2192    initWakeRecognition();\n   659\u2192    try { wakeRecognition.start(); } catch (_) {}\n   660\u2192  }\n   661\u2192}\n   662\u2192\n   663\u2192function stopWakeRecognition() {\n   664\u2192  quickRing.classList.remove('listening-passive');\n   665\u2192  if (wakeRecognition) {\n   666\u2192    try { wakeRecognition.stop(); } catch (_) {}\n   667\u2192  }\n   668\u2192}\n   669\u2192\n   670\u2192function scheduleWakeRestart() {\n   671\u2192  clearTimeout(wakeRestartTimer);\n   672\u2192  wakeRestartTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n   673\u2192    if (wakeMode && !isListening && !wakeTriggered) {\n   674\u2192      startWakeRecognition();\n   675\u2192    }\n   676\u2192  }, 300);\n   677\u2192}\n   678\u2192\n   679\u2192function handleWakeWordDetected() {\n   680\u2192  if (isListening || wakeTriggered) return;\n   681\u2192  wakeTriggered = true;\n   682\u2192  wakeTriggeredRecording = true; // flag so finishRecording auto-sends\n   683\u2192  stopWakeRecognition();\n   684\u2192  // Give the recognition engine a moment to fully stop before starting main recording\n   685\u2192  setTimeout(() => {\n   686\u2192    wakeTriggered = false;\n   687\u2192    startListening('quick'); // wake word always triggers quick mode\n   688\u2192  }, 250);\n   689\u2192}\n   690\u2192\n   691\u2192function enableWakeMode() {\n   692\u2192  wakeMode = true;\n   693\u2192  wakeBtn.classList.add('wake-active');\n   694\u2192  wakeBtn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', 'true');\n   695\u2192  wakeBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Disable wake word');\n   696\u2192  wakeBtn.title = 'Wake word: ON';\n   697\u2192  localStorage.setItem('wakeMode', '1');\n   698\u2192  updateWakeHint();\n   699\u2192  if (!isListening) startWakeRecognition();\n   700\u2192}\n   701\u2192\n   702\u2192function disableWakeMode() {\n   703\u2192  wakeMode = false;\n   704\u2192  wakeBtn.classList.remove('wake-active');\n   705\u2192  wakeBtn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', 'false');\n   706\u2192  wakeBtn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Enable wake word');\n   707\u2192  wakeBtn.title = 'Wake word: Hey Chill';\n   708\u2192  localStorage.setItem('wakeMode', '0');\n   709\u2192  clearTimeout(wakeRestartTimer);\n   710\u2192  stopWakeRecognition();\n   711\u2192  updateWakeHint();\n   712\u2192}\n   713\u2192\n   714\u2192function updateWakeHint() {\n   715\u2192  if (!isListening) {\n   716\u2192    micHint.textContent = wakeMode ? 'Say \"Hey Chill\" or tap Quick' : '';\n   717\u2192    micHint.classList.remove('active', 'brainstorm-active');\n   718\u2192  }\n   719\u2192}\n   720\u2192\n   721\u2192wakeBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n   722\u2192  primeAudio();\n   723\u2192  if (wakeMode) {\n   724\u2192    disableWakeMode();\n   725\u2192  } else {\n   726\u2192    enableWakeMode();\n   727\u2192  }\n   728\u2192});\n   729\u2192\n   730\u2192// Restore wake mode preference across sessions\n   731\u2192if (SpeechRecognition && localStorage.getItem('wakeMode') === '1') {\n   732\u2192  enableWakeMode();\n   733\u2192}\n   734\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
  }
}
