The IndexedDB operations that normally happen during recording aren't needed for replay since we're just retrieving existing data.\n\nFor the replay flow, we send the start/stop recording messages with the audio chunks, wait for the text response and idle status, then show the transcript bar. The `_awaitingBrainstormResult` flag handles this correctly. I've already disabled the brainstorm button during replay, but I need to be careful in the finally block\u2014I shouldn't re-enable it if `isBrainstormProcessing` is still true.\n\nThe problem is that the finally block runs before the WebSocket response arrives, so enabling the brainstorm button there would let the user click it while processing is still happening. I need to make sure the button stays disabled until the processing actually completes. Let me simplify: don't set `brainstormBtn.disabled` at all. Just use the click handler conditions to prevent invalid state transitions. The visual state will be clear from the lack of recording animation.\n\nActually, disabling buttons during recording and processing is important for UX feedback. I need to be more careful about when to re-enable them. For replay, I'll disable all the action buttons at the start, then re-enable them once the processing completes and the state flags are reset.\n\nSetting up replay button logic... I see the issue\u2014I'm manually managing button states across multiple code paths, which is error-prone. Instead, I should create a single function that determines button availability based on all the current activity flags, so the disabled state is always consistent regardless of which code path executes. Finishing up the button state logic for the remaining cases\u2014when processing or replaying, all buttons should be disabled, and in the idle state I need to check for Speech Recognition support and handle the replay button separately. I'm realizing this is getting complicated with scattered disabled assignments, so I should consolidate everything into a single `updateButtonStates()` function that handles all the state transitions cleanly rather than managing button states across multiple functions. I'm going to stop overthinking this and just implement it pragmatically. The core logic is straightforward: disable the brainstorm button when quick mode is active, disable the quick button when brainstorm is active or processing, and disable both during replay. I'll handle the button state updates inline within each function rather than trying to coordinate them across multiple places.\n\nFor the WebSocket status indicator, I need to map the different connection states to visual feedback\u2014'connected' shows green, 'connecting' shows orange, and I'll treat 'generating' the same as 'connected' since the client is still ready to receive input. I'm realizing the timer logic works differently in the merged version\u2014it stops in `rainstormRecording()` rather than when the status changes, so I don't need special handling for the 'generating' state. I also need to strip out references to `storageStatus`, `enhancedTranscript`, and the extra enhancement buttons since those are being replaced with the message history and webhook pattern. Now I'm ready to write out all three files with these adjustments in mind.\n\nFor the connection status indicator, I'll place the ws-dot under the Brainstorm button in the metadata section since it's only relevant there. I'm keeping the `isMobileDevice()` utility but won't apply it beyond what's already implemented. For the CSS, I'll use Hey Chill's stylesheet as the foundation and layer in the new elements like model selection, connection indicator, timer display, replay button, and brainstorm metadata styling.\n\nWriting the merged files now...",

name=\"theme-color\" content=\"#1a1a2e\"/>\n  <meta name=\"mobile-web-app-capable\" content=\"yes\"/>\n  <meta name=\"apple-mobile-web-app-capable\" content=\"yes\"/>\n  <meta name=\"apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style\" content=\"black-translucent\"/>\n  <title>Brainwave</title>\n  <link rel=\"stylesheet\" type=\"text/css\" href=\"static/style.css\"/>\n</head>\n<body>\n  <div id=\"app\">\n\n    <!-- Header -->\n    <header class=\"header\">\n      <div class=\"header-title\">\n        <span class=\"logo-dot\"></span>\n        <h1>Brainwave</h1>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"header-actions\">\n        <select id=\"modelSelect\" class=\"model-select\" title=\"Brainstorm model\">\n          <option value=\"gpt-realtime-mini-2025-12-15\" selected>Mini</option>\n          <option value=\"gpt-realtime-1.5\">v1.5</option>\n        </select>\n        <button class=\"icon-btn\" id=\"settings-btn\" aria-label=\"Settings\" title=\"Settings\">\n          <svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\">\n            <circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"3\"/>\n            <path d=\"M19.4 15a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 .33 1.82l.06.06a2 2 0 0 1-2.83 2.83l-.06-.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.82-.33 1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1 1.51V21a2 2 0 0 1-4 0v-.09A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 9 19.4a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.82.33l-.06.06a2 2 0 0 1-2.83-2.83l.06-.06A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 4.68 15a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.51-1H3a2 2 0 0 1 0-4h.09A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 4.6 9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-.33-1.82l-.06-.06a2 2 0 0 1 2.83-2.83l.06.06A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 9 4.68a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1-1.51V3a2 2 0 0 1 4 0v.09a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1 1.51 1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.82-.33l.06-.06a2 2 0 0 1 2.83 2.83l-.06.06A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 19.4 9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.51 1H21a2 2 0 0 1 0 4h-.09a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.51 1z\"/>\n          </svg>\n        </button>\n      </div>\n    </header>\n\n    <!-- Message history -->\n    <main class=\"messages\" id=\"messages\" aria-live=\"polite\" aria-label=\"Message history\">\n      <div class=\"messages-empty\" id=\"messages-empty\">\n        <p>Your messages will appear here</p>\n      </div>\n    </main>\n\n    <!-- Transcript bar (shown after recording stops, awaiting send/discard) -->\n    <div class=\"transcript-bar\" id=\"transcript-bar\" hidden>\n      <p class=\"transcript-text\" id=\"transcript-text\"></p>\n      <div class=\"transcript-actions\">\n        <button class=\"btn-ghost\" id=\"discard-btn\">Discard</button>\n        <button class=\"btn-send\" id=\"send-btn\">Send</button>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Live transcript (shown while recording / processing) -->\n    <div class=\"live-transcript\" id=\"live-transcript\" hidden>\n      <p id=\"live-text\">Listening\u2026</p>\n    </div>\n\n    <!-- Mic section -->\n    <section class=\"mic-section\">\n      <div class=\"mic-hint\" id=\"mic-hint\"></div>\n\n      <div class=\"mic-buttons\">\n\n        <!-- Quick: Web Speech API, browser-native, no backend -->\n        <div class=\"mode-btn-wrap\">\n          <div class=\"mic-ring\" id=\"quick-ring\">\n            <button class=\"mic-btn\" id=\"quick-btn\"\n                    aria-label=\"Quick \u2013 tap to speak\" aria-pressed=\"false\">\n              <svg class=\"mic-icon\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                <path d=\"M12 1a4 4 0 0 1 4 4v7a4 4 0 0 1-8 0V5a4 4 0 0 1 4-4z\"/>\n                <path d=\"M19 11a1 1 0 0 1 1 1 8 8 0 0 1-16 0 1 1 0 1 1 2 0 6 6 0 0 0 12 0 1 1 0 0 1 1-1z\"/>\n                <line x1=\"12\" y1=\"19\" x2=\"12\" y2=\"23\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"/>\n                <line x1=\"8\" y1=\"23\" x2=\"16\" y2=\"23\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"/>\n              </svg>\n            </button>\n          </div>\n          <span class=\"mode-label\">Quick</span>\n        </div>\n\n        <!-- Brainstorm: WebSocket Realtime API -->\n        <div class=\"mode-btn-wrap\">\n          <div class=\"mic-ring brainstorm-ring\" id=\"brainstorm-ring\">\n            <button class=\"mic-btn brainstorm-btn\" id=\"brainstorm-btn\"\n                    aria-label=\"Brainstorm \u2013 tap to record\" aria-pressed=\"false\">\n              <svg class=\"mic-icon\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                <rect x=\"2\"  y=\"8\"  width=\"3\" height=\"8\"  rx=\"1.5\"/>\n                <rect x=\"7\"  y=\"4\"  width=\"3\" height=\"16\" rx=\"1.5\"/>\n                <rect x=\"12\" y=\"6\"  width=\"3\" height=\"12\" rx=\"1.5\"/>\n                <rect x=\"17\" y=\"2\"  width=\"3\" height=\"20\" rx=\"1.5\"/>\n              </svg>\n            </button>\n          </div>\n          <span class=\"mode-label brainstorm-label\">Brainstorm</span>\n          <div class=\"brainstorm-meta\">\n            <span id=\"timer\" class=\"timer-text\" hidden>00:00</span>\n            <button id=\"replayButton\" class=\"replay-btn\" disabled title=\"Replay last recording\">\n              <svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\">\n                <path d=\"M3 12a9 9 0 0 1 9-9 9.75 9.75 0 0 1 6.74 2.74L21 8\"/>\n                <path d=\"M21 3v5h-5\"/>\n                <path d=\"M21 12a9 9 0 0 1-9 9 9.75 9.75 0 0 1-6.74-2.74L3 16\"/>\n                <path d=\"M3 21v-5h5\"/>\n              </svg>\n            </button>\n            <span id=\"connectionStatus\" class=\"ws-dot\" title=\"WebSocket status\"></span>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n      </div>\n    </section>\n\n    <!-- Not supported: Quick mode only -->\n    <div class=\"not-supported\" id=\"not-supported\" hidden>\n      <p>Speech recognition is not supported in this browser. Quick mode unavailable; Brainstorm mode still works.</p>\n    </div>\n\n  </div><!-- #app -->\n\n  <!-- Settings Modal -->\n  <div class=\"modal-overlay\" id=\"modal-overlay\" hidden>\n    <div class=\"modal\" role=\"dialog\" aria-modal=\"true\" aria-labelledby=\"modal-title\">\n      <div class=\"modal-header\">\n        <h2 id=\"modal-title\">Settings</h2>\n        <button class=\"icon-btn\" id=\"modal-close\" aria-label=\"Close settings\">\n          <svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\">\n            <line x1=\"18\" y1=\"6\" x2=\"6\" y2=\"18\"/>\n            <line x1=\"6\" y1=\"6\" x2=\"18\" y2=\"18\"/>\n          </svg>\n        </button>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"modal-body\">\n        <label for=\"lang-select\">Language (Quick mode)</label>\n        <select id=\"lang-select\">\n          <option value=\"\">Auto-detect</option>\n          <option value=\"en-US\">English (US)</option>\n          <option value=\"zh-HK\">Cantonese (\u5ee3\u6771\u8a71)</option>\n        </select>\n        <p class=\"field-hint\">Language used for Quick mode speech recognition.</p>\n\n        <label for=\"webhook-url\">Webhook URL</label>\n        <input type=\"url\" id=\"webhook-url\"\n               placeholder=\"https://your-webhook.example.com/hook\"\n               autocomplete=\"off\" spellcheck=\"false\"/>\n        <p class=\"field-hint\">Messages are POSTed here as <code>{ text, source, timestamp }</code>.</p>\n\n        <label for=\"backend-url\">Brainwave Backend URL</label>\n        <input type=\"url\" id=\"backend-url\"\n               placeholder=\"https://your-brainwave-backend.example.com\"\n               autocomplete=\"off\" spellcheck=\"false\"/>\n        <p class=\"field-hint\">Brainstorm connects to this host's WebSocket (<code>/api/v1/ws</code>). Leave blank to use the same host.</p>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"modal-footer\">\n        <button class=\"btn-send\" id=\"save-settings\">Save</button>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n\n  <script src=\"static/main.js\"></script>\n</body>\n</html>\n"
}
